programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Ian gleefully warns Max he now has the upper hand on him - unless Max wants the whole Square to know who he has been kissing. Tina visits Mick, who is despondent after his day at the care home, but she assumes he is upset because of losing the Vic and sets out to get rid of Ian for good. Meanwhile, Jack and Whitney warn Tiffany about her surrogacy plans and Thompson confronts Callum

programme.title: River City
programme.desc: Poppy reveals her darkest fears about the identity of the stalker, while the Murdoch boys' anxious search for Lenny leads them back to the Foulkes', but should they be searching closer to home? Lou and Jac they take a big step together, and Kim is not as excited about Levi's dinner invite as he thought she would be

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Sacha makes a controversial decision while operating on a cancerous patient, which leaves Max, Donna and Dom all concerned about his actions and general welfare - but their interference results in him taking out his frustrations on Jodie. Cameron tries to get back on a furious Chloe's good side, but his actions have disastrous consequences for a patient. Clayton demands that Kian come clean about his drug habit

programme.title: MasterChef: The Professionals
programme.desc: The four chefs competing in this round are challenged to prepare either potato rosti served with egg, bacon and tomatoes or tempura mussels with a smoked garlic aioli for their skills test. For the second round, they have one hour and 25 minutes to cook their own two-course signature dishes and secure themselves a place in the quarter finals

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: Richard Bilton reports on the businesses fighting to survive the pandemic as customers are left unable to make sue of their services, from the adventure playground with no children to an events company with no events. Filmed over the course of the first and second lockdowns, this programme reveals the pressure on those trying to save jobs and livelihoods.

programme.title: Getting Hitched Asian Style
programme.desc: Series going behind the scenes with Scotland's biggest Asian wedding planners, Saffron Events, as they create some of the most spectacular weddings over a summer season. This time, Saffron Events owner Hassan and his team of wedding planners are helping ex-employee Shabnum plan a series of events for her brother Naiem from Livingston

programme.title: We Are Who We Are
programme.desc: Fraser and Caitlin become close, but even as they grow to understand each other, they remain unsure about their own sexual identities. Their friendship creates a safe space in which Caitlin starts to consider the idea of a sex change, while Fraser develops a crush on a soldier in his mother's chain of command

programme.title: We Are Who We Are
programme.desc: Soldier Craig is about to be deployed on a mission in Afghanistan. The feeling of impending danger and the imminent departure of a key member of their group push the kids to embrace the present with unrestrained urgency, as they organise an impromptu send-off party at an abandoned villa

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Chris Mason and Tina Daheley present a round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Gary Lineker presents highlights of the latest Premier League matches, including Brighton & Hove Albion v Liverpool at Amex Stadium and Manchester City v Burnley at Etihad Stadium. Liverpool and the Citizens have dominated their respective fixtures in recent years, but a number of unpredictable results this season so far demonstrated the need to avoid complacency

programme.title: The Andrew Marr Show
programme.desc: Andrew Marr is joined by foreign secretary Dominic Raab MP, shadow foreign secretary Lisa Nandy MP, and first minister of Scotland and leader of the SNP Nicola Sturgeon MSP. News review with BBC Scotland editor Sarah Smith and editor of the Sheffield Star Nancy Fielder. Follow @BBCPolitics and @JohntNeal for any further updates

programme.title: Sunday Politics Northern Ireland
programme.desc: Mark Carruthers looks at the political developments of the week and questions policy=makers on the key issues

programme.title: Sunday Worship
programme.desc: The Very Rev Dr Paul Shackerley leads a service for the first Sunday of Advent from Brecon Cathedral. With hymns from the Songs of Praise archives from across Wales

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion Dublin and Martel Maxwell meet the new owners of a third-floor flat in Walworth, central London, and a block of flats in Hengoed in South Wales

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams are challenged to scour an antiques fair and pick up bargains to sell for profit at auction

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: Aled Jones hosts the boys' semi-final of the BBC Young Chorister of the Year in Manchester, with five youngsters hoping to impress judges John Rutter, Laura Wright and Carl Jackson

programme.title: Final Score
programme.desc: Manish Bhasin presents highlights, analysis and talking points from the second round of the FA Cup

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Ginny Buckley meets a couple who are looking to lay down roots in Devon after decades serving in the Army, and have a budget of £400,000 to find their ideal home

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Creatures that live on coral reefs, including groupers, small predators that scientists believe are as intelligent as chimpanzees. These creatures have a remarkable aptitude for communication to the point where they can interact with other species including octopi and work together to catch prey. Plus, footage of a vast spawning event involving several different species of fish, coral and invertebrates, and time-lapse photography of coral polyps growing and dying, creating a structure visible from space

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: The team launches Plant Britain, an ambitious two-year challenge aimed at encouraging everyone in the nation to get planting - no matter where they live or how much space they have. Matt Baker is in Cheshire planting the very first trees in what will become the programmes Plant Britain wood, while Anita Rani is in her hometown of Bradford to help residents of the Canterbury estate to plant trees in their front gardens and at a local primary school

programme.title: Strictly Come Dancing
programme.desc: Tess Daly and Claudia Winkleman announce the results of the judges' scores and viewers' votes from Saturday's performances. The two couples with the lowest combined scores will take part in a dance-off before the judges decide which pair will leave the contest. Plus, a performance by Gary Barlow

programme.title: His Dark Materials
programme.desc: In search of the knife, Will and Lyra try to gain entry into the Torre Degli Angeli, and discover a tied-up Giacomo. In Oxford, Boreal's offer of private funding is refused by Mary, while Lee finds Grumman - or Jopari as he is now known - and they take to the skies in search of the bearer. Adaptation of Philip Pullman's fantasy adventure novel series, starring Dafne Keen

programme.title: Small Axe
programme.desc: Black forensic scientist Leroy Logan decides to join the Metropolitan Police in the hope of changing racist attitudes in the force from within its ranks. Leroy has to not only face the consequences of his father's disapproval, but also the blatant racism he finds in his new role as a despised yet exemplary constable in the Met. Fact-based drama by Courttia Newland and Steve McQueen, starring John Boyega and Steve Toussaint

programme.title: Match of the Day 2
programme.desc: Mark Chapman presents action from today's Premier League fixtures, including Southampton v Manchester United at St Mary's Stadium and Chelsea v Tottenham Hotspur at Stamford Bridge. The Saints held United to a 1-1 draw in last season's corresponding fixture and will have fancied their changes of gaining at least a point once again given their strong start to the season, but most of United's best results this term have come on their travels. The London rivals will both have aspirations of challenging for the title and the Blues will also be hoping to avenge a penalty shootout defeat at the hands of Spurs at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium in the Carabao Cup

programme.title: Defending Digga D
programme.desc: Documentary following the 20-year-old drill artist after his release from a 15-month stint in prison for violent disorder, intent on making a success of his music career

programme.title: Suzie Lee's Home Cook Heroes
programme.desc: Suzie cooks a roast chicken dinner in less than an hour using ingredients provided by the Toman family from Belfast. She goes back to her Chinese takeaway roots with sweet and sour chicken, and continues her mission against waste by using the leftovers in a chicken super food salad. To round off, she bakes white chocolate and raspberry choux buns

programme.title: Anton Ferdinand: Football, Racism & Me
programme.desc: The former professional footballer goes on a deeply personal journey to explore the issue of racial abuse in the game, talking about his own highly-publicised 2011 incident with ex-England captain John Terry. He reveals where he believes players are still being failed by the system, and the ways in which football urgently needs to change

programme.title: Showbands: How Ireland Learnt to Party
programme.desc: The showband was a uniquely Irish phenomenon. It was a movement that saw thousands of young people travel up and down the country in the late '50s, '60s and early '70s to the 'Dancehalls of Romance' to be entertained by the Royal Showband, the Miami Showband and Big Tom and the Mainliners, and individuals including Dickie Rock, Joe Dolan and Brendan Bowyer. Ardal O'Hanlon looks back at the phenomenon, examining what triggered the infamous era, the people involved, and its eventual end in the 1980s

programme.title: 100 Women Extra
programme.desc: Finland has a coalition government led by five women - four of them are in their 30s. Their prime minister, Sanna Marin, was the youngest world leader when she was elected. Finland's coalition government has been praised for their quick and decisive action on the coronavirus pandemic, but a coalition can also mean compromise. The BBC has had world-first exclusive access behind the scenes to explore how the coalition works in practice, how representative it is of Finland's society, and what impact the age and sex of the government's main players has had on its policies and effectiveness.

programme.title: Click
programme.desc: To celebrate BBC 100 Women, Click profiles the most inspiring and influential women in technology, from the leaders shaping our future to those finding solutions to the challenges thrown up by the pandemic. The women featured are those driving change, not just for women, but for all parts of society. Hearing their inspirational stories, we learn not only how these women are making an impact, but also the challenges they've faced and the diverse backgrounds they come from. Using in-depth profiles, we provide audiences with a rare and intimate glimpse into the lives of the women who are transforming the world of technology at a unique time in our history. Women who are steering global technology policy, fighting bias in artificial intelligence, using data from sewers to combat Covid-19 and creating fertility solutions. Others have founded companies focusing on mental health, online abuse, women's health, vertical farming and current transport restrictions. With rare-access only Click can

programme.title: Witness History
programme.desc: For this special, women-focused edition of Witness History, the BBC's Ciru Muriuki in Nairobi brings us five moments from the recent past as told to us by the women who were there. We hear from the daughter of the world's first female prime minister. We also learn about the fight for equal rights for women at the Western Wall in Jerusalem and the campaign for the right to take the contraceptive pill in Japan. Plus, Nasa's female space pioneers and one of the crew members of the Discovery Shuttle mission that put into orbit one of the most remarkable scientific instruments of all time, the Hubble telescope.

programme.title: The Firing Line
programme.desc: 2020 has been heavily defined by the Covid-19 pandemic, which has led to social disruption around the world and the deepest economic recession since the Great Depression. The year has also seen a record number of entries for the Rory Peck Awards. The awards pay tribute to an international field of freelance journalists around the world who have continued to capture some of the most dramatic and important news and current affairs stories - working in difficult and dangerous circumstances. The Firing Line, presented by Yalda Hakim, features the finalists and the winners of the awards.

programme.desc: Chaotic cartoon capers following the further adventures of the popular halfwit immortalised in the live-action TV series and Hollywood films. With the voice of Rowan Atkinson

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: Madcap slapstick and mayhem as the celebrated cat and mouse plot against each other

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania

programme.title: DC Superhero Girls
programme.desc: Always getting picked on at school, Karen Beecher discovers that tiny Bumblebee might be the only one small enough to save the day.

programme.title: Best Walks with a View with Julia Bradbury
programme.desc: Setting off from Rosthwaite, a small village in the jaws of Borrowdale, the expert walker takes in the history and landscape of the Cumbrian fells as she heads up the small peak Castle Crag, which stands at less than 1,000ft. The presenter is joined by celebrated mountaineer Chris Bonington, to whom she asks - which is better - Everest or Castle Crag? From the lush green valley floor to magnificent views over Derwent Water, this walk is a great way to take home a lasting memory of the Lake District, and all in under three hours

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Joining Alan Titchmarsh in Hampshire this week are Ronan Keating, who'll be trying the best British whiskies, and David Jason, who shares his remarkable life story.

programme.title: All Around Britain
programme.desc: Alex Beresford and Ria Hebden visit the country's most fascinating attractions, sharing extraordinary stories of human endeavour and must-see places

programme.title: Griff's Great Australian Adventure
programme.desc: Riding an historic Tiger Moth bi-plane, Griff Rhys Jones arrives in the humid tropics of Darwin. He encounters a crocodile and an iconic news editor, before travelling through the night on a road train, arriving in the 'red centre' of Alice Springs - only to be surprised by the lush green sporting fields and the mysterious Americans playing baseball there. The presenter gets some tips on how to survive in the desert from an Aboriginal elder, before riding into the sunset on a camel - in tribute to the Afghan cameleers for which the legendary Ghan passenger train is named

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop (1990)
programme.desc: A tough detective is forced to pose as a preschool teacher in a bid to capture a drug dealer whose son is one of the pupils. However, his biggest challenge turns out to be controlling a class full of five-year-olds. Comedy, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Penelope Ann Miller, Linda Hunt, Pamela Reed and Richard Tyson

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. James, Rak, Lynn and Chris work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught

programme.title: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Lily, Siona, Mohammed, Tom, Sam, Stephen, Sharon, Judith and Danny use their wits and numbers to try to get through to the final to win the prize pot. Hosted by Omid Djalili

programme.title: 5 Gold Rings
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Phillip Schofield, in which married couple Matt and Paige take on twin sisters Lauren and Danielle. They attempt to answer visual questions by placing rings on an LED floor in the hope of winning more than £50,000

programme.title: Tipping Point: Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Ben Shephard welcomes funny man Richard Herring, actor Joe McFadden and reality star Olivia Attwood. They answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the better their chances of collecting the £20,000 prize for their selected charity

programme.title: Who Wants To Be A Millionaire: The Million Pound Question
programme.desc: Former teacher David Edwards looks back on his life-changing journey to success, along with wife Viv and his phone a friend, son Richard. Plus, there's a look at the memorable games of celebrities including Lee Mack and Stacey Solomon

programme.title: I'm a Celebrity Get Me Out of Here!
programme.desc: The celebrities have endured two weeks of castle life, and they continue to battle it out in the quest to be crowned winner of the 2020 contest. Ant and Dec present

programme.title: Tyson Fury: The Gypsy King
programme.desc: The heavyweight celebrates a victory over Tom Schwarz in Las Vegas by enjoying a night of heavy drinking back home in Morecambe and video-calling rival Anthony Joshua. This angers his wife Paris, who is reminded of his alcohol abuse during his years of depression, and Fury looks to make amends by treating the family to a day out in Blackpool and booking a family holiday. The boxer then heads to Marbella with trainer Ben Davison, before preparing to face his next opponent Otto Wallin back in Vegas, in what proves to be a challenging fight

programme.desc: Gabriel Clarke introduces a selection of clips and profiles from the ITV Sport archives, including an interview with a young Tyson Fury predicting great things for his future in boxing.

programme.desc: Klaus is diagnosed with fish cough, which is has a 99 per cent mortality rate. There is a life-saving surgery available, but it's too expensive and Stan refuses to pay for it. programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Klaus is diagnosed with fish cough, which is has a 99 per cent mortality rate. There is a life-saving surgery available, but it's too expensive and Stan refuses to pay for it. Klaus is irate when he learns that Stan paid more for Navi-Joe - his car's new 'smart' navigation and sound system - than the surgery would cost, so uses CIA technology to transfer his consciousness into Stan's beloved nav system. Plus, Steve and his friends play a prank on Roger, who decides to terrorise them as he seeks vengeance

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The residents of Milton Cross, a feudal estate with a church, farms, houses and acres of land, depend on lord of the manor Edward Milton for their livelihoods. When local woman Sonia Woodley is stabbed to death in the churchyard two years after the death of her husband, bespoke tailor Gerald, Barnaby and Jones investigate, and the village begins to reveal its secrets. Detective drama, guest starring James Wilby, Gwyneth Strong and Karl Davies (formerly Emmerdale's Robert Sugden), with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Barnaby is dragged along to the wedding of the son of Sarah's friend Hazel, the last thing he expects to find himself doing is investigating a murder. But when his wife discovers the body of the bride, Laurel, who has been squeezed to death by her own wedding dress corset, the detective must look more closely at his fellow guests. The victim's husband Gavin is convinced that his wife's death had everything to do with her outspoken nature on her radio show, so Winter's attention soon turns to her unique community of nocturnal listeners. Gavin's scorned ex-fiancee and local wedding dress designer Serena also comes under suspicion, and Barnaby and Winter's enquiries lead them to a local wedding fayre. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Kelly Brook, Nick Hancock and Liz Fraser

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Things take a gruesome turn when Ferabbees Circus comes to town, bringing with it a chain of sinister clown sightings, threatening notes and deathly dangerous circus acts. Barnaby has to face up to his fears in order to solve the case. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Nick Hendrix, Lorraine Ashbourne and Annette Badland

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A comic convention is held in Carver Valley, but the event gets off to a sinister start when the latest creation of a mysterious writer is stolen from the organiser's house and burned. Barnaby takes up the case, which turns murderous when a former supermodel is killed during the event. The only clue is an unusual issue of the missing comics, which seems to reveal the dark secrets of six local people - and provides the police with six likely suspects. Guest starring Bill Bailey and Jemma Redgrave

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective delves into the past of extreme sports enthusiast Gideon Frane after he plunges from a cliff in a ball of flames. A scan of the files reveals a long list of stalking complaints against an ex, and an anonymous letter to the victim spelling out Burn in Hell is linked to one of her friends. Aided by DC Shepherd and the newly appointed DC Edwards, the team tries to track down Gideon's old gang to uncover a lifetime of bullying and an unexpected story of rough justice

programme.title: The Loch
programme.desc: Annie continues her determined investigation into the killer's identity, and reaches a breakthrough when she discovers the weapons that were used in the murders. Seeking help from Quigley, she is finally able to track down the culprit, and the two detectives put their lives on the line to put a stop to the slaughter. However, their relentless pursuit of justice leads them into a dangerous confrontation, as they stalk the armed murderer through the dark corridors of the area's hydro-electric dam

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer Parva hosts the revival of a traditional pagan festival, but tragedy strikes when curate Alex Dakin is burned alive inside a straw effigy of a woman. The body count rises as an apparent victim of spontaneous combustion, a budding photographer and a newly arrived schoolteacher are the next to be roasted alive. Keith Barron guest stars

programme.title: Griff's Great Britain
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones explores the picturesque estuaries of Suffolk and Essex in the second leg of his journey through the British landscape. Amongst his challenges are attempting to eat a 'Colchester Native', helping to build a replica of the Mayflower and enjoying the beauty of Constable country

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The Aidensfield policemen are called to subdue anti-war protestors at a disused airfield, but the event has serious repercussions for Walker after he accidentally hits one of the mob with his truncheon. Younger is gutted to discover Rosie has feelings for new vet Fergus, who is the indirect cause of chaos when a cobra escapes from his car at the garage. Irritated that nobody's taking her snake-catching suggestions seriously, Peggy refuses to help with the hunt and drives off with David - straight into the arms of danger. With Jonathan Kerrigan, Gwen Taylor, Vanessa Hehir and Andrew Langtree

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: When Sid receives a bonus, the family are quick to remind him how helpful they all are

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is left two large packing cases in an uncle's will - but they come with a terrible curse

programme.title: Outside Edge

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Roger returns to Liverpool, while Pop discovers Edith's new boyfriend George is a con-artist defrauding the ministry - and resolves to teach him a lesson. David Jason stars

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Larry goes to Athens on a short trip, and returns with a royal guest. Louisa is delighted to have a prince staying under her roof, but soon finds herself with a less welcome visitor in the shape of Captain Creech. Tension is soon stirred up between the two houseguests when Gerry sits an interview for a local school, and the prince and the captain voice very different opinions on the subject of education

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Paul Nicholas guest stars as a Swedish sailor who waits for his ship home in Bernie's funeral parlour - but may not be telling the truth about the contents of the coffin he's escorting. A trio of young joyriders steal Carol's car while she is attending to a patient and decide to experiment with the drugs they find in her medical bag as well as selling them on to interested parties. Rosie and Fergus struggle to get their fledgling relationship off the ground as a series of interruptions plague their dates, while Bellamy starts to wonder whether trying again with Gina is really such a good idea. With Lisa Kay, Vanessa Hehir, Mark Jordon and Tricia Penrose

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly discovers Chris has made an appointment for her at a private clinic. Paddy is incensed when he reads the letter from Kim Tate evicting Outhwaite

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rachel tackles Chris about his relationship with Kelly, Dee and Eric row in the tearooms, and Mandy cooks a meal for Paddy, but it is not what he was expecting

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Norris arrives at Mavis's party with tragic news about Derek. Jim confronts Andy about leaving university. Tricia warns Vera that she will not remain a prisoner at the Rovers

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Judy calls on Mavis to offer her condolences. Maxine asks Ashley if he wants to start afresh with her. Mike is thrilled when the insurance company pay out in full

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The inspector and his sidekick DS Hathaway investigate the murder of a talented maths student. The prime suspect is the victim's ex-boyfriend, who is convinced his uncle has set him up, but old case papers belonging to Morse reveal the boy's family is hiding a dark secret. Laurence Fox and Rebecca Front co-star alongside Kevin Whately

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An opera singer is shot by a sniper at an Oxford University ceremony just as she is about to receive an honorary degree. Morse is a big fan of her work and thinks she could not possibly be involved in anything untoward, but his investigations turn up more than a few sordid secrets. Detective drama, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Robert Hardy, Sheila Gish, John Gielgud and Rachel Weisz

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: A nasty stomach bug sweeps through Portwenn and the doctor suspects the local water supply is to blame, taking to the airwaves in a bid to warn everyone. Meanwhile, Al remains determined to leave the plumbing business and attend college, prompting an argument with Bert. Medical comedy drama, starring Martin Clunes, Joe Absolom and Caroline Catz

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective is brought in to investigate when a former Met police officer is stabbed to death outside a nightclub in Newcastle. The team initially suspects a crime of passion after it emerges the victim had recently rekindled his affair with his childhood sweetheart, whose husband has a history of violence. However, Vera uncovers evidence pointing to a more complex case involving inside information and the hostile takeover of a brewery. What did the deceased find out that cost him his life? Guest starring Jill Halfpenny, Christine Bottomley, Ralph Ineson and Liam Cunningham

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Keen to unwind, Geordie and Will head to a charity boxing match at Vic's gym. However, as Matthew and Luke face off in the ring the bout takes an unexpected twist. Will wonders if he's misjudged Matthew all along and when two boys are later found near death, Will must face up to his own part in the tragedy to help uncover the truth. Meanwhile, Leonard tries to reunite the warring Chapmans, who seem determined never to see eye-to-eye again. Robson Green, Tom Brittney and Al Weaver star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering five people is killed in prison shortly before going to trial, wrapping up a lot of loose ends and saving the state the expense of keeping him behind bars indefinitely. Alas, Morse cannot help wondering why the body of one of his victims was never found - and the chance discovery of a corpse gives him the perfect opportunity to investigate further. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star

programme.desc: The team turns out for another Saturday game. Comedy, starring Josie Lawrence, Timothy Spall, Robert Daws and Brenda Blethyn

programme.desc: Part one of two. A seat becomes vacant on the local council when Sam Popham is taken ill, so Pop stands in the election, and Mariette returns from holiday with Charley. David Jason stars

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Spiros spends time with a glamorous Italian family who have recently arrived on the island. Louisa is jealous of the attention he is paying their new neighbours and invites them over to learn more about them. She ends up convinced they are hiding something, while Margo feels threatened by their eldest daughter. Larry joins the fire service, and Gerry falls in love

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When a guest at the Aidensfield Arms explains she's searching for her missing son, Blaketon offers to help - but as his hunt progresses, it becomes clear somebody is trying to do him harm. Peggy turns down David's offer of dinner on her birthday in favour of a date with an old flame, and Bellamy finally opens up about his troubles under pressure from Walker

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Paddy is late for work after struggling with indigestion all night. Dee tells Will to stop pestering her. Zoe is shocked when Chris tells her about Kelly being pregnant

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah acts coldly towards Jack. Tony is adamant that Emma cannot keep her horse. Mandy does not want to take up Mrs Taylor's offer of selling underwear

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mavis is upset at the thought of Angela attending the funeral. Tricia is impressed by Ray and spends the night with him. Ashley tells Jack that Don is cracking up

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken struggles to compose a tribute to Derek for the funeral. Tricia considers moving in with Ray. Andy visits Steve in prison to apologise for getting his sentence increased

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective suspects a connection between the death of a student with secret plans for advancement and the killing of well-known criminal Nicky Turnball, who was in Oxford to speak at the Union. As Lewis and Hathaway eliminate suspects from a long list of the crook's enemies, the investigation brings him into contact with old flame Diane - who also happens to be Turnball's wife. Kevin Whately stars, with Laurence Fox and Gina McKee

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering five people is killed in prison shortly before going to trial, wrapping up a lot of loose ends and saving the state the expense of keeping him behind bars indefinitely. programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa tries to help one of her pupils, a bright 10-year-old who finds it hard to fit in and responds to stress by running away from home. Mark seeks advice on how to remedy his lack of success with the opposite sex, while Martin encounters a delusional park ranger with an unusual imaginary friend - a giant squirrel called Anthony. Medical comedy drama series, starring Martin Clunes

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates the death of a pensioner found stabbed on a train at the height of rush hour. The case has a huge impact on Joe's home life when his daughter is named as a key witness, and he struggles to maintain a professional distance. The trail leads the team to a quiet Northumberland coastal town where clues appear to lead to one particular street - but why are the residents so reluctant to talk? Starring Brenda Blethyn, with David Leon, Sonya Cassidy, Jon Morrison and Eva Birthistle

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead laid out in the shape of a crucifix on Jesus Green, Will and Geordie are led to a nearby convent where they meet steely Sister Grace, who rules over her flock with an iron fist. Even more sinister is the picture that starts to emerge as they match the nuns to a series of unsolved missing persons cases from the previous five years. Meanwhile, when Leonard's father, Russell, arrives in Grantchester, it's clear there's no love lost between parent and son. Robson Green, Tom Brittney, Tracy-Ann Oberman and Sean Gilder star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The murder of a retired university fellow leads to a complex investigation for Morse and Lewis as they piece together a story of student suicide, drugs and the mysterious dismissal of a loyal college scout. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Phyllis Logan, Gabrielle Lloyd, Amanda Ryan and Tony Haygarth

Detective drama, guest starring James Wilby, Gwyneth Strong and Karl Davies (formerly Emmerdale's Robert Sugden), with John Nettles and Jason Hughes

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Barnaby is dragged along to the wedding of the son of Sarah's friend Hazel, the last thing he expects to find himself doing is investigating a murder. But when his wife discovers the body of the bride, Laurel, who has been squeezed to death by her own wedding dress corset, the detective must look more closely at his fellow guests. The victim's husband Gavin is convinced that his wife's death had everything to do with her outspoken nature on her radio show, so Winter's attention soon turns to her unique community of nocturnal listeners. Gavin's scorned ex-fiancee and local wedding dress designer Serena also comes under suspicion, and Barnaby and Winter's enquiries lead them to a local wedding fayre. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Kelly Brook, Nick Hancock and Liz Fraser

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Things take a gruesome turn when Ferabbees Circus comes to town, bringing with it a chain of sinister clown sightings, threatening notes and deathly dangerous circus acts. Barnaby has to face up to his fears in order to solve the case. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Nick Hendrix, Lorraine Ashbourne and Annette Badland

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A comic convention is held in Carver Valley, but the event gets off to a sinister start when the latest creation of a mysterious writer is stolen from the organiser's house and burned. Barnaby takes up the case, which turns murderous when a former supermodel is killed during the event. The only clue is an unusual issue of the missing comics, which seems to reveal the dark secrets of six local people - and provides the police with six likely suspects. Guest starring Bill Bailey and Jemma Redgrave

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective delves into the past of extreme sports enthusiast Gideon Frane after he plunges from a cliff in a ball of flames. A scan of the files reveals a long list of stalking complaints against an ex, and an anonymous letter to the victim spelling out Burn in Hell is linked to one of her friends. Aided by DC Shepherd and the newly appointed DC Edwards, the team tries to track down Gideon's old gang to uncover a lifetime of bullying and an unexpected story of rough justice

programme.title: The Loch
programme.desc: Annie continues her determined investigation into the killer's identity, and reaches a breakthrough when she discovers the weapons that were used in the murders. Seeking help from Quigley, she is finally able to track down the culprit, and the two detectives put their lives on the line to put a stop to the slaughter. However, their relentless pursuit of justice leads them into a dangerous confrontation, as they stalk the armed murderer through the dark corridors of the area's hydro-electric dam

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer Parva hosts the revival of a traditional pagan festival, but tragedy strikes when curate Alex Dakin is burned alive inside a straw effigy of a woman. The body count rises as an apparent victim of spontaneous combustion, a budding photographer and a newly arrived schoolteacher are the next to be roasted alive. Keith Barron guest stars

programme.title: Griff's Great Britain
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones explores the picturesque estuaries of Suffolk and Essex in the second leg of his journey through the British landscape. Amongst his challenges are attempting to eat a 'Colchester Native', helping to build a replica of the Mayflower and enjoying the beauty of Constable country

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: The couple go to a family wedding, but they don't bargain on Jean's cousin Peggy being there

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid has problems when Jean pleads for a new freezer

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Liam is left reeling, Priya is hurt when she has a suggestion, and Jacob tells Leyla he is going to Portugal

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Chris spends the night on Angie's sofa. Steve is convinced Fiona will marry him and not Alan. Mike plans to record Don confessing to starting the fire

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Don tells Ashley he was joking about setting fire to the factory. Vera worries that Tricia and Ray are getting serious. Jim tells Andy he must stop feeling sorry for himself

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kathy tries to help Sam to read. Biff tells Kim about Steve's deal with Alex. Kelly tells Chris that she is pregnant. Heather and Lyn accuse Eric of swindling Outhwaite

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim is fuming with Steve over his involvement with Alex. Chris tells Kelly he will help her get an abortion. Lyn finds Outhwaite unconscious on the floor of one of the barns

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: The Aidensfield policemen are called to subdue anti-war protestors at a disused airfield, but the event has serious repercussions for Walker after he accidentally hits one of the mob with his truncheon. Younger is gutted to discover Rosie has feelings for new vet Fergus, who is the indirect cause of chaos when a cobra escapes from his car at the garage. Irritated that nobody's taking her snake-catching suggestions seriously, Peggy refuses to help with the hunt and drives off with David - straight into the arms of danger. With Jonathan Kerrigan, Gwen Taylor, Vanessa Hehir and Andrew Langtree

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: When Sid receives a bonus, the family are quick to remind him how helpful they all are

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid is left two large packing cases in an uncle's will - but they come with a terrible curse

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: Kevin and Mim meet Maggie for the first time. Cricketing comedy drama, starring Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part two of two. Roger returns to Liverpool, while Pop discovers Edith's new boyfriend George is a con-artist defrauding the ministry - and resolves to teach him a lesson. David Jason stars

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Larry goes to Athens on a short trip, and returns with a royal guest. Louisa is delighted to have a prince staying under her roof, but soon finds herself with a less welcome visitor in the shape of Captain Creech. Tension is soon stirred up between the two houseguests when Gerry sits an interview for a local school, and the prince and the captain voice very different opinions on the subject of education

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Paul Nicholas guest stars as a Swedish sailor who waits for his ship home in Bernie's funeral parlour - but may not be telling the truth about the contents of the coffin he's escorting. A trio of young joyriders steal Carol's car while she is attending to a patient and decide to experiment with the drugs they find in her medical bag as well as selling them on to interested parties. Rosie and Fergus struggle to get their fledgling relationship off the ground as a series of interruptions plague their dates, while Bellamy starts to wonder whether trying again with Gina is really such a good idea. With Lisa Kay, Vanessa Hehir, Mark Jordon and Tricia Penrose

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kelly discovers Chris has made an appointment for her at a private clinic. Paddy is incensed when he reads the letter from Kim Tate evicting Outhwaite

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Rachel tackles Chris about his relationship with Kelly, Dee and Eric row in the tearooms, and Mandy cooks a meal for Paddy, but it is not what he was expecting

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Norris arrives at Mavis's party with tragic news about Derek. Jim confronts Andy about leaving university. Tricia warns Vera that she will not remain a prisoner at the Rovers

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Judy calls on Mavis to offer her condolences. Maxine asks Ashley if he wants to start afresh with her. Mike is thrilled when the insurance company pay out in full

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The inspector and his sidekick DS Hathaway investigate the murder of a talented maths student. The prime suspect is the victim's ex-boyfriend, who is convinced his uncle has set him up, but old case papers belonging to Morse reveal the boy's family is hiding a dark secret. Laurence Fox and Rebecca Front co-star alongside Kevin Whately

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An opera singer is shot by a sniper at an Oxford University ceremony just as she is about to receive an honorary degree. Morse is a big fan of her work and thinks she could not possibly be involved in anything untoward, but his investigations turn up more than a few sordid secrets. Detective drama, starring John Thaw, Kevin Whately, Robert Hardy, Sheila Gish, John Gielgud and Rachel Weisz

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: A nasty stomach bug sweeps through Portwenn and the doctor suspects the local water supply is to blame, taking to the airwaves in a bid to warn everyone. Meanwhile, Al remains determined to leave the plumbing business and attend college, prompting an argument with Bert. Medical comedy drama, starring Martin Clunes, Joe Absolom and Caroline Catz

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective is brought in to investigate when a former Met police officer is stabbed to death outside a nightclub in Newcastle. The team initially suspects a crime of passion after it emerges the victim had recently rekindled his affair with his childhood sweetheart, whose husband has a history of violence. However, Vera uncovers evidence pointing to a more complex case involving inside information and the hostile takeover of a brewery. What did the deceased find out that cost him his life? Guest starring Jill Halfpenny, Christine Bottomley, Ralph Ineson and Liam Cunningham

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Keen to unwind, Geordie and Will head to a charity boxing match at Vic's gym. However, as Matthew and Luke face off in the ring the bout takes an unexpected twist. Will wonders if he's misjudged Matthew all along and when two boys are later found near death, Will must face up to his own part in the tragedy to help uncover the truth. Meanwhile, Leonard tries to reunite the warring Chapmans, who seem determined never to see eye-to-eye again. Robson Green, Tom Brittney and Al Weaver star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering five people is killed in prison shortly before going to trial, wrapping up a lot of loose ends and saving the state the expense of keeping him behind bars indefinitely. Alas, Morse cannot help wondering why the body of one of his victims was never found - and the chance discovery of a corpse gives him the perfect opportunity to investigate further. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: Sid informs Jean he has been given a temporary promotion at work, but she soon begins to doubt what he says. Seventies comedy, starring Sid James

programme.title: Outside Edge
programme.desc: The team turns out for another Saturday game. Comedy, starring Josie Lawrence, Timothy Spall, Robert Daws and Brenda Blethyn

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Part one of two. A seat becomes vacant on the local council when Sam Popham is taken ill, so Pop stands in the election, and Mariette returns from holiday with Charley. David Jason stars

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: Spiros spends time with a glamorous Italian family who have recently arrived on the island. Louisa is jealous of the attention he is paying their new neighbours and invites them over to learn more about them. She ends up convinced they are hiding something, while Margo feels threatened by their eldest daughter. Larry joins the fire service, and Gerry falls in love

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: When a guest at the Aidensfield Arms explains she's searching for her missing son, Blaketon offers to help - but as his hunt progresses, it becomes clear somebody is trying to do him harm. Peggy turns down David's offer of dinner on her birthday in favour of a date with an old flame, and Bellamy finally opens up about his troubles under pressure from Walker

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Paddy is late for work after struggling with indigestion all night. Dee tells Will to stop pestering her. Zoe is shocked when Chris tells her about Kelly being pregnant

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah acts coldly towards Jack. Tony is adamant that Emma cannot keep her horse. Mandy does not want to take up Mrs Taylor's offer of selling underwear

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Mavis is upset at the thought of Angela attending the funeral. Tricia is impressed by Ray and spends the night with him. Ashley tells Jack that Don is cracking up

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken struggles to compose a tribute to Derek for the funeral. Tricia considers moving in with Ray. Andy visits Steve in prison to apologise for getting his sentence increased

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: The detective suspects a connection between the death of a student with secret plans for advancement and the killing of well-known criminal Nicky Turnball, who was in Oxford to speak at the Union. As Lewis and Hathaway eliminate suspects from a long list of the crook's enemies, the investigation brings him into contact with old flame Diane - who also happens to be Turnball's wife. Kevin Whately stars, with Laurence Fox and Gina McKee

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: A man accused of murdering five people is killed in prison shortly before going to trial, wrapping up a lot of loose ends and saving the state the expense of keeping him behind bars indefinitely. Alas, Morse cannot help wondering why the body of one of his victims was never found - and the chance discovery of a corpse gives him the perfect opportunity to investigate further. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa tries to help one of her pupils, a bright 10-year-old who finds it hard to fit in and responds to stress by running away from home. Mark seeks advice on how to remedy his lack of success with the opposite sex, while Martin encounters a delusional park ranger with an unusual imaginary friend - a giant squirrel called Anthony. Medical comedy drama series, starring Martin Clunes

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: The detective investigates the death of a pensioner found stabbed on a train at the height of rush hour. The case has a huge impact on Joe's home life when his daughter is named as a key witness, and he struggles to maintain a professional distance. The trail leads the team to a quiet Northumberland coastal town where clues appear to lead to one particular street - but why are the residents so reluctant to talk? Starring Brenda Blethyn, with David Leon, Sonya Cassidy, Jon Morrison and Eva Birthistle

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead laid out in the shape of a crucifix on Jesus Green, Will and Geordie are led to a nearby convent where they meet steely Sister Grace, who rules over her flock with an iron fist. Even more sinister is the picture that starts to emerge as they match the nuns to a series of unsolved missing persons cases from the previous five years. Meanwhile, when Leonard's father, Russell, arrives in Grantchester, it's clear there's no love lost between parent and son. Robson Green, Tom Brittney, Tracy-Ann Oberman and Sean Gilder star

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The murder of a retired university fellow leads to a complex investigation for Morse and Lewis as they piece together a story of student suicide, drugs and the mysterious dismissal of a loyal college scout. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Phyllis Logan, Gabrielle Lloyd, Amanda Ryan and Tony Haygarth

programme.title: DTM Highlights 2020
programme.desc: A look back at the campaign, from the season opener in Spa in August through to the season finale at Hockenheim

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: A youth is arrested after an elderly money-lender is brutally assaulted and robbed. His mother asks Regan, an old friend, to intervene. Though it is later proved he got a legitimate loan and is innocent of theft, the youngster finds himself being blackmailed after falling foul of some very dangerous individuals. Karl Howman guest stars, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: The newly promoted lieutenant accepts a diplomatic commission as the war reaches a stalemate, and finds himself on French soil in the midst of a daring plot to overthrow the government. Swashbuckling adventure, starring Ioan Gruffudd, Robert Lindsay and Antony Sher

programme.title: Live Darts: Players Championship Finals
programme.desc: Coverage of the afternoon session on day three from Ricoh Arena in Coventry, featuring the quarter-finals. Gerwyn Price, Chris Dobey, Michael van Gerwen and Ian White were the victorious players at this stage last year. Jacqui Oatley presents, with analysis from Alan Warriner-Little, Chris Mason and Mark Webster, and commentary by Stuart Pyke and Dan Dawson

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Reports of attacks in a remote part of Ukraine take extreme angler Jeremy Wade on a hunt for an elusive lake monster, and to the site of the world's worst nuclear accident - Chernobyl's reactor number four. Can he reveal the culprit and deliver it to the scientists searching for evidence of mutant species?

programme.title: The Big Fish Off
programme.desc: Team captains Ali Hamidi and Dean Macey continue the competitive angling show, with this edition pitting football pundit Mark Bright against DJ Spoony. A wind-up causes the boys to nearly come to blows in this match that kicks off with an urban challenge in the heart of Walthamstow

programme.title: World Cup Rivalries: England v Argentina
programme.desc: Short sports film about this compelling sporting rivalry.

programme.title: Live Darts: Players Championship Finals
programme.desc: All the action from the evening session on day three from Ricoh Arena in Coventry, featuring the semi-finals and final of the tournament featuring the top 64 players on the Order of Merit. Gerwyn Price and MIchael van Gerwen both recorded 11-8 victories in their semi-finals last year, against Chris Dobey and Ian White respectively, and it was van Gerwen who prevailed in the final for the fifth time, winning 11-9. Jacqui Oatley presents, with analysis from Alan Warriner-Little, Chris Mason and Mark Webster, and commentary by Stuart Pyke and Dan Dawson

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy (2004)
programme.desc: The amnesiac assassin is living quietly in hiding, until his former employers come after him again and murder his girlfriend. A CIA operation has ended in disaster, and those responsible intend to clear their names by implicating Bourne. As the former secret agent tries to evade the hitmen on his trail, he also struggles to piece together the truth about his past. Action thriller sequel, starring Matt Damon, Brian Cox, Joan Allen and Julia Stiles

programme.desc: Regan encounters a former nemesis at a party, who drunkenly admits involvement in an earlier robbery in which he was let go due to lack of evidence. programme.title: Live Darts: Players Championship Finals
programme.desc: All the action from the evening session on day three from Ricoh Arena in Coventry, featuring the semi-finals and final of the tournament featuring the top 64 players on the Order of Merit. Gerwyn Price and MIchael van Gerwen both recorded 11-8 victories in their semi-finals last year, against Chris Dobey and Ian White respectively, and it was van Gerwen who prevailed in the final for the fifth time, winning 11-9. Jacqui Oatley presents, with analysis from Alan Warriner-Little, Chris Mason and Mark Webster, and commentary by Stuart Pyke and Dan Dawson

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy (2004)
programme.desc: The amnesiac assassin is living quietly in hiding, until his former employers come after him again and murder his girlfriend. As the former secret agent tries to evade the hitmen on his trail, he also struggles to piece together the truth about his past. Action thriller sequel, starring Matt Damon, Brian Cox, Joan Allen and Julia Stiles

His mission is to rebuild a business that he has just purchased, Pacific Monarch Resorts, which has locations across the western US and Mexico. He disguises himself as an ex-construction worker who wants to open a boutique hotel, going the extra mile by having his ears pierced to complete the look

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Includes headlines and weather

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a restaurant in Mount Sinai, New York, which appears to be stuck in the 1980s. The crumbling decor and unenthusiastic head chef at the Handlebar need to be tackled, but owners Bill and Carolyn LeRoy are in denial about the problems they face

programme.title: Steph's Packed Lunch
programme.desc: Steph McGovern presents the weekday magazine, including celebrity guests, food ideas, real-life features and entertainment, lifestyle and consumer stories. Plus, a sideways look at the news in One O'Clock Views

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.desc: The first of two highlights programmes celebrating 10 years of the culinary contest. Featuring some of the most unusual, confusing and innuendo-laden cakes to grace the tent. The programme also revisits some of the most popular contestants from past series, including Norman, Flo and Kim-Joy

programme.title: The Truth About Amazon
programme.desc: Sabrina Grant and Helen Skelton investigate how the online retailer's dominant position in the marketplace and wealth of consumer information forces other companies to adapt their retail strategy to keep up. The programme also reveals how Amazon is rapidly replacing Google as the biggest gateway to the Internet and examines the company's plans to enter the grocery trade

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes a professional dancer from London who is seeking a man to lose his virginity with - and who can keep up with him on the dance floor. The second of this episode's contestants is a rugby player who has been out of the dating game for a while and is shy around women, but hopes that seeing a potential date naked will give him a confidence boost

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Daisy May Cooper, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring take on a number of ludicrous challenges, hoping to walk away with their reputations intact. Mawaan is not at all fazed when faced with a task involving office chairs, chickens and remote control cars, although the same cannot be said of his rivals. Daisy tries to decipher mysterious messages from Richard, and Katherine is baffled by a giant marble

programme.title: 120 BPM (2017)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in New Jersey to help Rose Leone, who spent two years in a coma and came out of hospital to learn her son Michael had run her once-thriving Italian restaurant into the ground. With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

On the second night, Hannah and Paul fail to wow their guests with a Middle Eastern and Moroccan menu, while the final soiree sees Ling and Mark prepare food they like to call 'Chinglish', which combines Ling's Chinese heritage and Mark's English roots

programme.title: Car S.O.S.

During the process, Tim takes a drive in one of the most beautiful cars in the world and Fuzz gets his hands on a Ferrari racing engine for the first time

programme.desc: Peter provides urgent dental treatment to his niece's horse, while Julian visits a group of vets in training to pass on what he knows about treating farm animals. programme.desc: Three-part documentary in which Dan Snow relives the famous 1943 bombing raid to destroy German dams. programme.title: The World's Biggest Murder Trial: Nuremberg
programme.desc: Feature-length documentary recounting the Nuremberg trials, when 21 Nazi leaders appeared in court charged with crimes that caused the deaths of millions of innocent people during the Second World War. The film is pieced together using more than a thousand archive clips, including recently digitised footage from the courtroom, and with no voiceovers of interviews, offers and immersive and impactful record of the biggest murder trial in history

programme.title: World's Greatest Warships
programme.desc: Charting the history of the warship from the dawn of the 20th century to the present day, drawing on expert interviews, footage and computer-generated animations. The first episode focuses on the stories of the Bismarck and the Tirpitz, the giant battleships that played a vital role for Germany in the naval battles of the Second World War

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: In an effort to find the terrorist Parsa, Gibbs and the NCIS team track down one of his cohorts using evidence gleaned from the drone attack which has killed six people and wounded a further 22. Meanwhile, an emotionally shaken McGee struggles with the ramifications of the incident. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, Sean Murray, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The murder of a port authority officer reveals Parsa's possible whereabouts as the team continues the hunt for the terrorist intent on wiping out NCIS. Bishop reveals her past association with the quarry and suggests where she thinks he may be found, but the CIA has intercepted a call that places Parsa in a different location to Ellie's hunch. Mark Harmon and Emily Wickersham star

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team uncovers faulty bulletproof vests in an abandoned truck filled with stolen USMC merchandise, and attempts to locate the source of the cargo and any vests that could have been sent to military personnel overseas. Crime drama, guest starring Challen Cates, with Mark Harmon

programme.title: Britain's Greatest Bridges
programme.desc: Engineer Rob Bell offers an insight into the history, design and building process of the Britannia Bridge, across the Menai Strait between the island of Anglesey and the mainland of Wales. The difficult task of building the 100ft iron structure was taken up by civil engineer Robert Stephenson and his team, including William Fairbairn and Eaton Hodgkinson. But in May 1970, four youths set light to the famous bridge, and Rob meets a fireman who fought the blaze that fateful night

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water (2015)
programme.desc: The cheery sea creature tries to prevent a precious secret formula from falling into the wrong hands - but when it goes missing, the end of the world approaches. SpongeBob and his friends embark on a quest to get it back, which leads to them developing superpowers and venturing onto dry land. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny and Antonio Banderas

programme.title: Black Nativity (2013)
programme.desc: A teenager is sent from Baltimore to New York to spend Christmas with his aunt and uncle. He cannot cope with living by their strict rules and runs away, having a series of adventures as he strives to find his mother. Musical, starring Jacob Latimore, Forest Whitaker, Angela Bassett and Jennifer Hudson

programme.title: A Christmas Carol (1984)
programme.desc: Miser Ebenezer Scrooge is given a Christmas Eve to remember when a quartet of ghosts - his dead business partner and the spirits of Christmases past, present and future - turn up determined to cure him of his money-grubbing ways. Adaptation of Charles Dickens' classic, starring George C Scott, Nigel Davenport, Frank Finlay, Angela Pleasence, David Warner, Edward Woodward and Susannah York

programme.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters (2013)
programme.desc: The modern-day teenage son of the Greek god Poseidon must lead his friends on a perilous journey into the Bermuda triangle. They need to recover the legendary Golden Fleece to save the world, but getting to it means braving all manner of terrifying monsters. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Logan Lerman and Alexandra Daddario

programme.title: Behind Enemy Lines (2001)
programme.desc: A reconnaissance pilot is shot down and becomes stranded in enemy territory after filming evidence of a genocidal massacre by Serb militia in Bosnia. The naval air commander for Nato forces in the Balkans defies orders by mounting an unauthorised mission to rescue him, while the airman faces a battle to stay alive as he is pursued by paramilitary forces. Bosnian War drama, starring Gene Hackman, Owen Wilson, Gabriel Macht and Olek Krupa

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation (2015)
programme.desc: The team of secret agents faces being shut down when the head of the CIA convinces the US Senate that it is too dangerous. The operatives of the Impossible Mission Force become fugitives when they defy orders and plot to bring down a shadowy society of assassins. Spy thriller sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Rebecca Ferguson and Simon Pegg

programme.title: Survivor (2015)
programme.desc: A US embassy official based in London goes on the run after being framed for a terrorist bombing, in which several of her colleagues are killed, and discovers a plot to detonate another bomb in Times Square during New Year's Eve celebrations in New York. Thriller, starring Milla Jovovich, Pierce Brosnan and Dylan McDermott

programme.title: Adore (2013)
programme.desc: Two women who have been friends all their lives live in a quiet stretch of the Australian coast. They find unexpected happiness after each has an affair with the other's teenage son, but their unusual relationships are threatened when the outside world intrudes on their isolation. Drama based on Doris Lessing's novel The Grandmothers, with Naomi Watts and Robin Wright

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Drama. Hope is a care-free, fun-loving Deaf teenager. But a fatal diagnosis is about to change everything.

programme.title: Man in the Saddle (1951)
programme.desc: A wealthy and ambitious cattleman plans to seize all the land surrounding his own. A peaceful rancher living nearby ignores warnings to sell up and avoid a conflict, and as he suffers a campaign of intimidation, he is forced to adopt violent methods to defend his livelihood. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Alexander Knox, Joan Leslie and Ellen Drew

programme.title: Thoroughly Modern Millie (1967)
programme.desc: A naive woman leaves her rural roots behind to seek fortune and romance in 1920s New York. She finds work as a secretary to a business tycoon, but he happens to be madly in love with her friend. However, before long she is wooed instead by a smitten salesman. Meanwhile, back at her boarding house, she stumbles across a shocking criminal enterprise involving the landlady. Musical comedy, with Julie Andrews, James Fox and Mary Tyler Moore

programme.title: The Dam Busters (1955)
programme.desc: The story of the destruction of the major dams in Germany's industrial heartland in the Ruhr valley in 1943, a mission that seemed impossible until engineer and scientist Barnes Wallis came up with the ingenious idea of bouncing bombs, and the pilots of 617 Squadron were trained to fly the crucial mission. Second World War drama, with Michael Redgrave, Richard Todd, Basil Sydney, Derek Farr and Ursula Jeans

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire (2013)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen's victory in a televised death match makes her a focus for revolution against the totalitarian nation she lives in. The rulers of the regime plot to crush dissent with a new series of games, in which past champions battle it out. Sci-fi adventure sequel based on the second book in Suzanne Collins' trilogy of novels, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Liam Hemsworth, Donald Sutherland and Philip Seymour Hoffman

programme.title: Pacific Rim: Uprising (2018)
programme.desc: Ten years after the Pan Pacific Defense Corps unleashed an army of Jaegers - 25-storey tall robots operated by mind-melded humans - former pilot Jake Pentecost is contacted by estranged sister Mako Mori. She implores him to return to the PPDC to head off the threat posed by Liwen Shao, chief executive of Shao Industries, who intends to replace the Jaegers with unmanned drones. Haunted by ghosts of the past, Jake eventually agrees to mentor a 15-year-old cadet called Amara, whose family were crushed to death during one monster attack. Director Steven S DeKnight's literally blockbusting sci-fi sequel, starring John Boyega, Scott Eastwood and Cailee Spaeny

programme.title: Patriots Day (2016)
programme.desc: A police sergeant appointed to security duty for the 2013 Boston marathon gets caught up in the aftermath of the bombing. He is drawn into the FBI investigation into the attack, and joins survivors, first responders and investigators in a race against the clock to hunt down the bombers before they flee the city. Fact-based drama, starring Mark Wahlberg, Michelle Monaghan, JK Simmons, Kevin Bacon and John Goodman

programme.title: Shame (2011)
programme.desc: A sex addict has carefully structured his life around his compulsion, constantly pursuing one-night stands and keeping everyone at arm's length emotionally. When his equally troubled sister turns up unexpectedly, he is forced to face up to his demons as his world starts to unravel. Steve McQueen's drama, starring Michael Fassbender and Carey Mulligan

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes (1969)
programme.desc: A second astronaut arrives on the strange simian-dominated world searching for his predecessor. As he journeys into the infamous forbidden zone, he discovers an underground cult of psychic mutants. Meanwhile, a military coup has taken place among the ape society, leading to an inevitable battle. Sci-fi sequel, with James Franciscus, Charlton Heston and Kim Hunter

programme.title: Gun Fury (1953)
programme.desc: A wealthy rancher and his fiancee take the stagecoach to California, where they intend to start a new life in the wake of the Civil War. However, during the journey an ex-Confederate outlaw and his gang of thugs attack the coach and kidnap the bride-to-be. Distraught and wounded, the rancher sets out to rescue her and punish her abductors. Western, with Rock Hudson, Donna Reed, Lee Marvin and Phil Carey

programme.title: The Man from Laramie (1955)
programme.desc: A cavalry officer determines to avenge the death of his brother, but rather than target the Apaches who killed him, he vows to go after the gang who supplied them with their weapons - leading to conflict with the sadistic son of an elderly rancher. Anthony Mann's Western, starring James Stewart, Arthur Kennedy, Donald Crisp and Cathy O'Donnell

programme.title: Three Violent People (1956)
programme.desc: A tough rancher falls for a woman he encounters at the end of the American Civil War, and promptly sweeps her off her feet. However, the couple's attempts to settle into married life are threatened by dark secrets in her past, as well as rising tensions both within the family, and on the political scene. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Anne Baxter, Gilbert Roland and Tom Tryon

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay - Part 1 (2014)
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen is brought to a secretive underground society following the destruction of the televised deathmatch. She becomes the figurehead of a revolution against the despotic Panem regime, while her friend Peeta remains a captive of its tyrannical president. Part one of the two-part conclusion to the sci-fi adventure series, starring Jennifer Lawrence, Philip Seymour Hoffman, Julianne Moore and Donald Sutherland

programme.title: Red (2010)
programme.desc: A retired CIA agent survives an assassination attempt and realises something in his past has made him a target. He sets out to reunite the members of his old hit squad to find out who is trying to kill them and why, but in the process, uncovers dangerous secrets. Action thriller, with Bruce Willis, Morgan Freeman, John Malkovich and Helen Mirren

programme.title: Transporter 3 (2008)
programme.desc: Underworld courier Frank Martin's latest assignment involves transporting the kidnapped daughter of a crooked government minister across Europe on behalf of an eco-terrorist faction. However, a device will kill him if he leaves his car, thugs employed by the politician are out to murder him, and his passenger has a bad case of Stockholm syndrome. Action thriller sequel, with Jason Statham and Natalya Rudakova

programme.title: Ema (2019)
programme.desc: An estranged couple struggle with the aftermath of giving up their adopted son, despite the violent acts he committed. Drama, starring Gael García Bernal and Mariana Di Girólamo. In Spanish with English subtitles

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Drama following the lives and loves of a group of teenagers and young adults in Chester

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zeke's, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Sam aims for a celebration inspired by pixies, although his fiancee Luanne dreams of a traditional wedding like the one her parents had

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Big kid Phil wants a wedding that will go down in history. But his Liverpudlian bride-to-be Elle has her heart set on a classy day at the iconic Liver Building

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: The Lobdells take on the Moons as a no-nonsense fire chief, who attempts to run her house like her battalion, swaps lives with a conservative, stay-at-home wife who caters to the every whim of her domineering husband

programme.title: Schooled
programme.desc: Greg tries to sabotage CB so that Weasel can get more credit. Principal Glascott tries to turn his predecessor's parking space into a community garden

programme.title: Schooled
programme.desc: Coach Mellor encourages Lainey to reunite with her mother. Meanwhile, Wilma is inspired to add a new addition to the robotics club after watching Good Will Hunting

programme.title: Schooled
programme.desc: CB is appointed substitute headteacher, only to ask Lainey to fix a problem he is unable to resolve. Mellor is jealous after hearing that Julie is friends with an attractive doctor

programme.title: Schooled
programme.desc: CB develops a crush on environmental consultant Paloma, who was brought in to manage the school's Earth Day activities. Meanwhile, Wilma convinces Lainey that yearbook superlatives are not important

programme.title: Schooled
programme.desc: Lainey struggles balancing her friendship with CB and her relationship with Barry, while Coach Mellor and Julie find it tough being parents after Toby gets an invite to prom

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Comic-book store owner Stuart asks Amy out on a date, forcing a jealous Sheldon to consider the future of his relationship with her. Meanwhile, the scientists become obsessed with an unusual new card game, and Penny organises a round of Twister. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Mayim Bialik

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard confronts the man who tormented him in high school, while Penny realises she did her fair share of bullying in the past and calls the people she targeted to apologise. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is uninterested in Amy's career, so Penny, Raj and Leonard try to make him understand that sometimes it benefits a relationship to pretend to care about a partner's achievements. Howard notices Bernadette is uncomfortable around children when she helps him perform a magic show at his nephew's birthday party

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard asks Penny out on a date, and they agree to give their relationship another chance. They soon remember why it did not work out in the first place, but end up sleeping together anyway. The 100th episode of the comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny continue testing their rekindled relationship using an innovative system to report discrepancies. Howard and Bernadette begin to worry when Raj starts treating his new phone like a person, while Sheldon and Amy try to achieve internet fame by creating a video podcast about flags

programme.title: The Crystal Maze
programme.desc: The Ali family are arguably the strongest team on paper ever to face the maze, but it remains to be seen how they cope in the game show hosted by Richard Ayoade

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Daisy May Cooper, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring take on a number of ludicrous challenges, hoping to walk away with their reputations intact. Mawaan is not at all fazed when faced with a task involving office chairs, chickens and remote control cars, although the same cannot be said of his rivals. Daisy tries to decipher mysterious messages from Richard, and Katherine is baffled by a giant marble

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel, Fielding, Sandi Toksvig, Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood welcome back eight past contestants to compete once more. In this first of two editions, Paul Jagger, Beca Lyne-Pirkis, Selasi Gbormittah and Val Stones face three festive challenges as they compete to win the Christmas Star Baker title

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of a mysterious dark power. Part two of Peter Jackson's fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkien's novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. They then they whittle the candidates down until only one remains. In the first edition, Aina, a music producer from London, wants to find someone adventurous who she can have a deeper connection with, while Guildford-based designer Mal - who has dated men and women - is curious to see who she will be drawn to when all options are laid bare before her

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After a sleepless night, Leonard breaks his room-mate agreement with Sheldon. Howard makes preparations to go on a flight to the International Space Station and enlists Raj's help to ensure he gets a cool astronaut nickname

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
