programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: A disgruntled Sabrina opts out of the traditional family Christmas and ends up erasing everyone's memory of the festive season altogether, until cousin Chris saves the day. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Valerie's wish is granted, and she begins turning into Sabrina, acquiring magic powers and becoming irresistible to Harvey. Meanwhile, Salem embarks on an artistic career, but understandably has trouble marketing his paintings

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted goes on a date and surprises his friends by not researching the woman on the internet beforehand, while Lily and Marshall learn the sex of their baby. Comedy, starring Josh Radnor, Alyson Hannigan and Jason Segel

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Barney and Nora's romantic evening is ruined by a series of chaotic events, and the gang realises everyone's partners bear some resemblance to their parents. Comedy, starring Josh Radnor

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: First episode of the family comedy starring Melissa Joan Hart as a local politician left to look after her niece and nephew after a family scandal, who is forced to seek the help of a male nanny to help her cope with her new responsibilities. With Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Comedy, starring Anthony Anderson, Tracee Ellis Ross and Laurence Fishburne

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: Rainbow is feeling overwhelmed after the birth of DeVante, and learns that she is suffering from post-natal depression. Dre urges her to get help and stands by her side as she works through it. Meanwhile, the kids make an effort to assist their parents by baby-proofing the house. Comedy, starring Tracee Ellis Ross

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: A prank goes disastrously wrong, destroying a crucial piece of evidence, leaving the officers trying to solve the mystery - with the help of visiting Detective Dillman (JK Simmons)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Howard and Bernadette cancel their holiday plans when Bernadette feels unwell and decide to have a secret stay-cation at home instead. However, the pair are soon disturbed by unexpected guests dropping by

programme.title: Scrubs

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Meanwhile, Jake bets Captain Holt that he can steal his Medal of Valour before midnight - a challenge that prompts him to don his own selection of disguises

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George meets a couple with a steadily expanding brood that has rapidly outgrown their narrowboat home. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Grand Designs New Zealand

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Professional deep-sea diver Adrian Corrigall and his wife Megan plan to build their new family home in rural East Sussex almost entirely out of concrete, with construction involving cutting-edge technologies conceived in Switzerland and never used to build a house before. programme.title: Prue Leith: Journey with My Daughter
programme.desc: The food writer travels to Cambodia with her adopted daughter Li-Da, in the hope of tracking down her biological family. Li-Da was like many of her generation evacuated from the country to escape Pol Pot's genocide, and Prue admits she has rarely questioned whether she could have helped her daughter connect more with her roots. Now, social media and DNA testing are allowing thousands of people to reconnect with lost relatives

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Gary, 50, is brought into St George's hospital by ambulance after a garage collapsed and fell on his legs. His wife Peta joins him, while Maggie, 83, comes in to A&E with suspected sepsis. She's joined by her son and daughter, who also deal with the fact their mother has lung cancer. Plus, cameras follow one-year-old George, who is rushed in with his mother after drinking nail varnish remover

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, as Jon Richardson and Michelle Wolf take on guest captain Jonathan Ross with Johnny Vegas. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of the Olde Stone Mill restaurant in Tuckahoe, New York, which is struggling to attract customers, leading to debts of nearly $1million. Gordon feels the owner is more interested in his own appearance than how his food tastes and a screaming match ensues

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George tackles two very different properties from the Georgian architectural period. First, he visits a townhouse in Yorkshire, which features high ceilings, a grand staircase and a heavy chandelier hanging from the original ceiling. Later, he travels to the Peak District, where he comes across a farmhouse which is in desperate need of a transformation

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade heads to the Canary Islands for a packed mini-break with actress and writer Lena Dunham, the star and creator of American comedy drama Girls. In the north of the island, Richard and Lena visit a guachinche pop-up restaurant, where they have goat stew before exploring the barren lunar-like landscape around the volcanic Mount Teide and spend the evening stargazing. There is also a sculpture tour, including works by Henry Moore and Joan Miro, as well as layered coffee, a spot of golf and a search for whales

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedian Rhod Gilbert spend 48 hours in Florida's largest city, for a densely packed mini-break including art, art deco slobbing, alligators, yoga, speedboats and dominoes. They also squeeze in an airboat tour of the Florida Everglades and a trip to Little Havana

programme.title: Top Gear

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and comedy actor Jack Dee embark on a clock-conscious exploration of the Italian city, enjoying two days rich in humour, history, culture and pizza. The pair start with a guided tour on vintage Vespas amid the city's chaotic traffic, attend a pizza-making class and then head to the volcanic ruins of Herculaneum. Day two sees them visit the Isle of Capri and play the lottery using la smorfia, a local guide to the meaning of dreams

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Reluctant tourist Richard Ayoade is joined by comedian Matt Lucas for a frenetic 48 hours in the Italian capital. Their first challenge is finding suitable headgear to protect from the scorching Italian sun. They then take a guided tour in vintage Fiat 500 cars, and after wending their way past the Circus Maximus finish atop Gianicolo Hill in time for the cannon being fired - a daily ritual since the 1850s. Next they head to the border of the Vatican, before experiencing the very best of modern Italian cuisine. Day two sees visits to the Trevi Fountain and the Colosseum, perhaps Rome's most incredible antiquity

programme.title: Rick Stein's Mediterranean Escapes
programme.desc: The chef experiences the bustling and colourful fish market in the Sicilian city of Catania and discovers dishes developed through centuries of poverty in Puglia on Italy's mainland. However, he is shocked to wake up one morning to find his vehicle is missing

programme.desc: Account of Operation Barbarossa, Germany's plan to invade the Soviet Union in 1941, revealing the massive human and financial cost endured by the Soviet people, who fought a bloody and lonely war with little support from the Allies. Narrated by Laurence Olivier

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The search for Josef Mengele, one of the most wanted Nazi war criminals, which was led by Holocaust survivor Simon Wiesenthal

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An American prison for the violent and deranged with links to an infamous cult leader, and a cavernous tunnel network in France offering shelter from unrelenting bombardment

programme.title: The Good Nazi
programme.desc: The story of Major Karl Plagge, a high-ranking Nazi officer who risked his own life to save hundreds of people, in a story reminiscent of Schindler's List

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Chenies Manor, near Amersham in Buckinghamshire, where members of the public bring along treasured antiques and collectibles. A young woman chooses a 21st birthday present from a collection of pocket watches kept in a biscuit tin and a train set that has been in its box for 70 years finally sees the light of day. Fiona reads a letter from a soldier to be opened in the event of his death, the relatives of a glassblower pay a moving tribute to their father's work and the update feature focuses on an ornate French plant stand first seen on the show in 1991

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: Cheltenham Spa station manager Richard Morrish braces himself for a hectic four days with the two-platform station used by more than 60,000 horse racing fans during the Cheltenham Festival. Just as the mainline at Dawlish is about to be reopened after being washed away in the winter storms, a crack is discovered in the sandstone cliffs two miles down the line and a landslide threatens to engulf the tracks. Conductor Jameil and driver Gary have to react quickly on the Reading to Gatwick service when a pedestrian takes a perilous short cut

programme.title: Secrets of Britain
programme.desc: An exploration of British landmarks, beginning with a look at the Tower of London - which has served as a castle, a jail and a place of execution

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An Albanian village home to Allied secret agents, devastated for resisting the Nazi war machine, and a notorious asylum in America that enforced lobotomies

programme.title: Nazi Hunters
programme.desc: The Jewish group the Avengers who, as the Second World War was ending, hunted down persecutors known to have contributed to deaths during the Holocaust, including Wilhelm Stuckart

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: British bombers are unable to hit their targets precisely and attack German cities under cover of darkness, while the Blitz in Britain brings public demand for revenge strikes, and Arthur Harris takes charge of Bomber Command

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo experiences first-hand Italy's 'need for speed' in a state-of-the-art Maserati sports car, and discovers how the leaning tower of Pisa was rescued from near collapse. In Carrara, he finds out how the marble used by Michelangelo is still being quarried and is invited to chip away at a contemporary sculpture. Moving on to Bologna, the former politician embarks on a doomed search for spaghetti bolognese before being taught how to prepare a tagliatelle al ragu. Finally, he lets the wind rush through his hair on a high-speed boat trip across Lake Garda

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: An abandoned railway station near a town in Spain that is home to just 500 people and a record-breaking Arctic facility that goes deep underground

programme.title: Secrets of the Railways
programme.desc: Documentary looking at railroads constructed during history's most turbulent periods, now associated with some of mankind's ugliest deeds. Beginning with the Trans-Pyrenees Railway

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: TV and radio presenter Chris Tarrant goes on three journeys by rail through some of the world's harshest terrain. He begins by heading to the Congo in central Africa to experience one of the greatest surviving railways of the colonial era, built by the French at a cost of tens of thousands of native lives and connecting the capital Brazzaville to the coast. Chris sets off on his scheduled two-day trip from the station at the port of Pointe-Noire, ending his journey six days - and a whole series of setbacks - later

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a second programme from the Somme battlefields, in which she and a small group of experts meet families with stories of courage and humanity in wartime, with various items helping to bring their tales to life. They include the story of a footballer who is said to have kicked a ball to lead an advance into enemy lines, and the account of one of the first nurses to have gone to war - and ended up serving alongside Edith Cavell. A German soldier's grandson reveals all the objects his relative took to the trenches where he lost his life - including a letter to be read in the event of his death - and Fiona tells the story of her great-grandfather, who fought at the Somme

programme.title: The Railway: First Great Western
programme.desc: As the deadline approaches for the reopening of the mainline at Dawlish, a 300-strong army of engineers works 24 hours a day to keep to the timetable. At London's Paddington station, a train with a Pullman silver service dining car is being prepared, with the onboard team pulling out all the stops to impress food writer Regula Ysewijn, who is researching an article. Elsewhere, North Cotswolds station manager Theresa - known as the 'smiling tiger' for the way she runs her stations firmly and with great care and dedication - keeps a watchful eye on the line between Oxford and Hereford, which carries the highest proportion of first-class ticket holders on the network

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Newbury Park in southern California to help Mexican restaurant Mama Rita's. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Le Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida, where the stubborn chef and owner has lost his passion for cooking. The visiting expert hopes to help, but his criticisms are not well received, causing tempers to flare

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off

programme.title: Jamie's Italian Christmas
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver draws inspiration from the snowy Alps of north Italy to help create his most delicious Christmas Day yet. In a cosy log cabin, accompanied by his mentor Gennaro Contaldo, the host cooks up an epic meal for the big day, taking turkey and trimmings and giving it extra sparkle with an Italian twist

programme.title: Heston's Feasts
programme.desc: DJ Jo Whiley, former model Jo Wood and musician Noddy Holder join Heston Blumenthal for a meal that reflects the memories of his 1970s childhood, beginning with savoury-flavoured ice lollies and DIY noodles. Next up is an inventive twist on the school-dinner staple of spam fritters, lumpy mash and cabbage, followed by an unusual dessert

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick and Angel Strawbridge turn their attentions to the wash house - a shell of an old stone building on the far side of the moat. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Daisy May Cooper, Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring take on a number of ludicrous challenges, hoping to walk away with their reputations intact. Daisy tries to decipher mysterious messages from Richard, and Katherine is baffled by a giant marble

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Look backing at some of the most memorable stories filmed at King's College Hospital, including a young woman who had been knocked unconscious in an attack on her way home. Elsewhere, 91-year-old Rose is rushed to King's with a suspected stroke, and reminisces about the strength and resilience of her own grandmother, and a junior doctor talks about his background growing up in Liverpool

programme.title: A Very Royal Christmas: Sandringham Secrets
programme.desc: A look at how the royal family celebrate Christmas Day at the Queen's country estate in Norfolk, combining archive footage with interviews from royal insiders and former staff. They discuss the garish gifts, classy celebrations and historical traditions, as well as why Monopoly has been banned from royal Christmases for more than a decade

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The dinner party challenge continues in Leicester with former dancer Ria Thomas hosting a night of spectacular entertainment, including a cancan dance that leaves some of the guests far from impressed

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Russell Dunmore hosts the penultimate dinner party in Leicester, and hopes his five-dish menu of two starters, steak to order and two desserts will give him the edge. programme.title: Come Dine with Me

programme.desc: Ray is delighted to be awarded an honorary doctorate, but hurts Debra's feelings by thanking everyone except her in his acceptance speech. He claims it was an accident, though she takes the opportunity to remind him of past snubs that were obviously deliberate

programme.title: Britain's Most Historic Towns
programme.desc: Alice Roberts explores Plymouth's history during the Elizabethan era, visiting the home of the city's most famous son, Sir Francis Drake, and uncovering his history of piracy and slave trading - all carried out with approval from the Queen. She also discovers the revolutionary shipbuilding techniques that helped defeat the Spanish Armada, while aerial archaeologist Ben Robinson highlights the physical characteristics that made Plymouth Harbour such an attractive base for pirates

programme.desc: This year marks the 50th anniversary since the first appearance of the Sun's page three girl. Here, in this look back at uniquely British institution, some of the most famous models tell their stories. Samantha Fox, Jilly Johnson, Maria Whittaker and Keeley Hazell describe the highs and lows of their profession, Rhian Sugden and Emma reveal the misery that came with tabloid scandal and Hannah Claydon talks about the countdown to her debut at the age of 16

programme.desc: One-off documentary going behind the scenes of Chatsworth, one of England's most impressive stately homes, as the Duke, Duchess and their 800 staff brace themselves for an influx of 200,000 visitors over the 2019 festive season. Christmas is the most important event for the Derbyshire estate and crucial to its survival. In just five days, the house is transformed with 30 Christmas trees, 60,000 baubles, and a million fairy lights. But this year Derbyshire has been crippled by unprecedented flooding. Can family and staff rally to make this a season to be remembered?

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement officers Paul and Steve's first job is an eviction with a twist when they find out the landlord is the tenant's son, while their next case is also tricky and involves family members with a question mark over their immigration status who are now facing homelessness. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection. Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy try to collect a debt from a technology company, but with the director nowhere to be seen, the office manager does everything she can to prove the business is no longer trading. Stewart McCracken and Elmor Victor face a heartbreaking house repossession in Merseyside, where two landlords are forced to evict a tenant recovering from a brain tumour which has cost him his job and income

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy get into a doorstep confrontation with a debtor who wants to prove her family business is bankrupt. However, when tempers flare Brian is assaulted and the agents call the police. Elsewhere, Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner face evicting people from three properties owned by the same landlord in north London, and Brian and Delroy Anglin collect £2,000 debt owed to a vet in Kent

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A driver mounts pavements, bumps into cars and collides with an ambulance as he tries to escape officers during a chase through the streets of Ripley in Derbyshire. An out-of-control car crashes into an interceptor's vehicle, and a helicopter is called in when a driver tries to lose his pursuers by taking the chase off-road

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A drink-driver damages one of the team's favourite cars, and Kevin hunts down a horsebox full of illegal plants. Elsewhere, officers are led on a chase across the countryside, Nick and Dee offer an insight into Taser tactics, and a very important visitor arrives in Chesterfield

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Jason heads to a Christmas party that has turned into a full-blown riot, while Adam and Nick catch a drunken woman giving her daughter a lift to the shops. Plus, Kev is seconds away from disaster when he places himself in the path of danger to prevent a car from becoming a fireball

programme.title: Britain's Parking Hell
programme.desc: Huddersfield residents protest against the parking problems caused by the town's football matches, and a couple reveal how they lost their home over an unpaid parking fine. On the other side of the coin, cameras follow parking officers, to see what it is like to face a daily barrage of abuse and threats of violence from unhappy motorists

programme.title: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Christian and Mandy, the organisers of the annual Pride festival, are 4,000 euros short of the 18,000 required to stage the weekend-long party - and if that were not bad enough, the costumes are seven sizes too big. With two weeks left, can the duo save the day? Cameras also follow bar owner Cath as she prepares to host a hen party for 14 excited Northern Irish women and Leeds lad Peter, who publishes a free pocket guide to the Costa del Sol

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Following the hidden army of enforcement teams and inspectors out to nail the litter louts and the fearless sewage warriors clearing the mess

programme.title: Extreme Fare Dodgers
programme.desc: With special access to Transport for London's revenue protection teams, this documentary tells the stories of frontline enforcement officers and undercover investigators fighting back against passengers dodging fares across the English capital ever day

programme.title: Adults Only
programme.desc: People making a living from selling sex, including a couple who run their burgeoning porn film business from their house in Southend while also looking after their children, and a 70 -year-old dominatrix working from a dungeon in her semi-detached house in Swindon

programme.title: 25 Myths About Lesbians
programme.desc: Documentary charting the lesbian movement, exploring myths born from an archaic past, including an assessment of Queen Victoria's views, and a look at global gay figureheads

programme.title: Wentworth Prison
programme.desc: Lou warns Allie to return the money or face the consequences, while Sheila offers to pay for Reb's surgery in an attempt to get an exonerating statement from him

programme.title: Wentworth Prison
programme.desc: After the siege many of the prisoners and officers struggle to rebuild their lives with the horror they endured, and the new General Manager deals with the fallout

programme.title: Empire
programme.desc: Kai digs up some dirt, Andre wonders whether his new relationship is the right choice, and Cookie and Lucious's financial prospects hang in the balance

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will tires of Karen's constant false alarms and vows to ignore her. Unfortunately, the moment he turns his back, the FBI turns up asking awkward questions about her husband. Meanwhile, Jack persuades Grace to accompany Elliot to a high-school dance. Comedy, starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will proves to be a talented actor, while Grace accepts an invitation to move into Karen's penthouse - but soon outstays her welcome. American sitcom, starring Eric McCormack and Debra Messing

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: A troubled Grace goes to Karen for advice about her relationship, concerned about the number of Nathan's past lovers. Jack takes advantage of his female supervisor's attraction to Will

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Rose shows her true colours when Alan spends more time with her, and Charlie writes the theme song for a cartoon based on one of Jake's favourite comics. However, the youngster does not think the music is right for the project

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie cannot understand why women have suddenly started rejecting his advances - until he discovers someone has set up a website dedicated to exposing him as a low-life Lothario. Determined to find out who's responsible, he begins contacting his former partners

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A retired couple in a seaside village in Norfolk battle with their non-paying tenant living in the flat above them, so they ask eviction expert Paul to help. Blackpool lettings agent John comes up against a hard drug user who is attracting antisocial wrongdoers to the bedsits that John runs, while in Leicestershire, Sharon battles to reclaim a property from a former friend who is close to £3,500 in arrears with rent

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Letting agent Paul uncovers a cannabis farm during a routine arrears inspection, but learns that the tenant has been in prison for the past four months and claims ignorance of the criminal crop. Meanwhile, builders Stuart and Steve win a possession order to regain their property, but face the worst damage they have ever seen and a £20,000 bill to repair it

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Documentary series giving an insight into the world of debt collection. Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy try to collect a debt from a technology company, but with the director nowhere to be seen, the office manager does everything she can to prove the business is no longer trading. Stewart McCracken and Elmor Victor face a heartbreaking house repossession in Merseyside, where two landlords are forced to evict a tenant recovering from a brain tumour which has cost him his job and income

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Kevin Stokes and Brian O'Shaughnessy get into a doorstep confrontation with a debtor who wants to prove her family business is bankrupt. However, when tempers flare Brian is assaulted and the agents call the police. Elsewhere, Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner face evicting people from three properties owned by the same landlord in north London, and Brian and Delroy Anglin collect £2,000 debt owed to a vet in Kent

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner get caught up in a dispute between a landlord and a tenant who refuses to move out, and Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin chase a £17,000 debt. In Essex, a couple owe their neighbour £11,000, and on the south coast, debt collection from a Turkish restaurant gets complicated when there is confusion about ownership

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In east London, High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Phil are involved in a brothel eviction, while in south Wales, Stewart and Elmore chase a debt owed by a working mum. Another case sees Stewart and Victor hunting down a £3,000 debt owed by a Liverpool takeaway for rent arrears

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A drink-driver is involved in a crash, a van full of criminals loses control in a high-speed pursuit, and the police helicopter is involved in a lengthy manhunt. Officers also deal with trouble on the streets of Derbyshire, and pursue a motorist who thinks he can outrun the law

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A runaway suspect puts Gary's life in danger, Scott and Adam discover a huge stash of drugs in the boot of a car, and officers are called to a New Year's Eve pub brawl. Plus, Ady catches a car thief, and five police vehicles are involved in a motorway chase

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Scott and Dave use GPS technology to track a pair of mobile-phone thieves, and a car crashes into a house during the Christmas period. Plus, Nick pursues a criminal gang, Vicky deals with a van containing suspicious-looking scrap, and Jason contends with his own traffic nightmare

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: A feud between neighbours in Falkirk that resulted in a brawl, and a violent attack with a saw that led to blood being spilled over the garden fence in Cheltenham

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV is helping to bring criminals using weapons to justice. A CCTV operator's instincts lead him to keep an eye on a man acting suspiciously on a train station platform and who then takes a knife out of his pocket and threatens a woman coming towards him. There is also footage of a raid on a west London jewellery shop, with the gang spraying bleach in the eyes of security guards and smashing down the doors with pickaxes while the terrified staff cower inside

programme.title: Watchmen (2009)
programme.desc: At the height of the Cold War, former superheroes driven into retirement by public outcry are confronted with the murder of one of their number. As they face the possibility of a conspiracy to eliminate them, they must contend with a world edging closer to the brink of nuclear war. Sci-fi drama, based on Alan Moore and Dave Gibbons' graphic novel, starring Patrick Wilson, Jackie Earle Haley, Malin Akerman and Billy Crudup

programme.title: Wentworth Prison
programme.desc: Facing prosecution for the siege and a life behind bars following the Attorney General's suicide, an embittered Marie makes a desperate, last-ditch attempt to avenge her son

programme.title: Rich Kids Go Homeless
programme.desc: Rukaya, a youngster who lives in a palatial seven-bedroom house with her parents, agrees to sleep rough on the streets of London for three nights. She soon feels vulnerable on the streets when a group of men intimidate her and a fellow homeless woman. Begging brings only 20p, so the second night is spent in a shelter, where she meets a woman whose alcoholism cost her her family

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan tries to win Kandi back, and Charlie takes a shine to her mother. Meanwhile, Judith is set up with Kandi's father Andy. Guest starring Kevin Sorbo, Gail O'Grady and April Bowlby

programme.title: Columbo: A Deadly State of Mind (1975)
programme.desc: A philandering psychiatrist, who involved his mistress in a series of hypnosis experiments, kills her husband in the heat of the moment when the pair are caught out. He persuades his distraught lover to make up a story involving two burglars, but Lt Columbo realises she is lying and goes in search of the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, George Hamilton and Lesley Warren

programme.title: Columbo: How to Dial a Murder (1978)
programme.desc: After discovering that his best friend and his wife were having an affair, a renowned psychologist uses his unique mind-control powers to commit a bizarre murder - with the help of two pet dogs conditioned to attack when they hear a certain command. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Nicol Williamson, Frank Aletter and Kim Cattrall

programme.title: Columbo: Short Fuse (1972)
programme.desc: The son of a chemical company's founder is blackmailed by his uncle, who wants to force him into selling the business. The cunning heir responds by murdering his relative with a box of exploding cigars, but finds himself facing the dishevelled detective, who is convinced the resulting fatal detonation was no accident. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Roddy McDowall and Ida Lupino

programme.title: Columbo: Publish or Perish (1974)
programme.desc: A ruthless publisher hires a hitman to kill a best-selling author who has threatened to sign with a rival company - but reckons without the involvement of the cigar-smoking sleuth, who is determined to put the culprit behind bars. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Mickey Spillane, Jack Cassidy and John Chandler

programme.title: Columbo: Murder in Malibu (1990)
programme.desc: A wealthy romantic novelist realises her lover is only marrying her for her money and calls off their wedding - only to be subsequently murdered. The fiance is quickly cleared of all suspicion, but Columbo remains sure of his guilt. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Andrew Stevens, Brenda Vaccaro and Laurie Walters

programme.title: Columbo: Dagger of the Mind (1972)
programme.desc: A London theatre producer discovers his actress wife is having an affair with her co-star in their latest production. To avoid exposure, the pair murder him and make it look as if his death was an accident. Meanwhile, Columbo is in the city to pick up some tips from Scotland Yard, and sets about uncovering the truth. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Honor Blackman, Richard Basehart and Wilfrid Hyde White

programme.title: Columbo: Candidate for Crime (1973)
programme.desc: An ambitious senatorial candidate murders his campaign manager for threatening to expose his secret affair. To avoid suspicion, the politician makes the killing look as if he was the intended target of an assassination attempt that went wrong - but ends up having to pit his wits against the slovenly sleuth. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Jackie Cooper, Ken Swofford and Tisha Sterling

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A troubled airport baggage supervisor is found murdered, prompting Goren and Eames to interrogate her colleagues about their reasons for distrusting her. The policemen finally uncover evidence of an operation that could well have been enough reason to silence the victim. Detective drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An Alzheimer's patient claims to have been raped. Fin receives his sergeant orders. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Ice-T

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson tries to reason with a woman who has taken a man hostage, while the team discovers the reasons for her desperate actions

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Emotions run high as the SVU squad embarks on a frantic search for Benson's missing son Noah after he is apparently kidnapped while clothes shopping with Sheila. Desperate to have her son safe and back with her, Benson decides to take matters into her own hands and tries to attempt to track down Noah's kidnapper. However, things eventually become extremely dangerous and Benson's life is soon put in serious danger as things take a shocking twist

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When the SVU investigates a sexual assault case involving two students in a special needs school, Rollins discovers that one child's medical issues stem from a surprising source. Detective drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Kelli Giddish

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A couple whose student son has been missing for a week fear the worst when they discover a badly decomposed body on the roof of a downtown warehouse, and the CSIs are called to investigate further. However, the case is turned on its head when the autopsy reveals the dead man's true identity, and an anonymous phone call leads the team on a wild chase through the city. Crime drama, guest starring Helen Slater

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A sniper begins a campaign of apparent random shootings in the city. The team knows that the killings are connected and identifies the criminal as a missing man who was subjected to abuse as a child, but Chief Carver refuses to make the information public, clashing with Mac in the process. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and John Larroquette

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: The Detail
programme.desc: A college student reports being raped six months earlier, once another young woman is found dead after a sexual assault. Meanwhile, Jack's former boyfriend reappears

programme.title: The Detail
programme.desc: Jack, Stevie and Fiona attempt to track down serial killer Alvin Flowers, who escaped justice 15 years earlier. The team hopes to find him before another teenager dies

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Part two of three. A witness reveals that personal trainer Newman flew to Los Angeles on the night of the murder, leading the officers to believe they have the wrong man. When blood matching the dead film studio executive's is found in their new suspect's car, they soon arrest him but their case may not be clear-cut enough to warrant a conviction. Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Conclusion of a three-part story. The investigation into a movie studio boss's murder becomes further complicated when fresh evidence points to yet another suspect. Meanwhile, the ex-husband of the deceased goes to trial to face accusations of having a hand in the crime - is an innocent man about to be convicted? Sam Waterston stars

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A woman is attacked and killed just hours after a serial rapist is freed on parole, prompting McCoy to pull out all the stops to bring him to justice - but before long the detective realises the wanted man could be innocent. Drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy tries to trap a crooked lawyer who bribes his clients - but as he tries to track down the man's accomplice, he realises the investigation has placed his own job on the line. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An answering machine message leads Briscoe and Curtis to reopen an investigation into an arson attack that killed a girl - but the 15-year-old suspect has a powerful ally in his grandfather, an influential force in political spheres. Award-winning police drama, guest starring Robert Vaughn (Hustle) alongside Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a Middle Eastern man sends Briscoe and Curtis racing to thwart a suspected terrorist plot to bring destruction to New York - and leads them to uncover a domestic conspiracy involving horrific female circumcision. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The American crime drama returns with the team still reeling from the Department of Defence investigation, with Ziva, McGee and Tony having handed in their badges. Parsons continues his inquiries into Gibbs and his agents, but events take a turn when an explosion kills the Secretary of the US Navy and seriously injures the director of Homeland Security. When attempts are made on the lives of Gibbs and Tony, it appears that all of the NCIS agents are in mortal danger. Starring Mark Harmon and Colin Hanks

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Sarah Porter, the new Secretary of the Navy, charges Gibbs and the team with finding terrorist group the Brotherhood of Doubt, which was responsible for killing her predecessor. She expects the group's next target to be billionaire Tomas Mendez, who spends his money trying to defeat terrorism, but whose motives may not be entirely altruistic. Meanwhile, Tony flies to Tel Aviv, where new Mossad director Orli Elbaz reveals they have a report of a possible sighting of Ziva at a kibbutz she went to as a child. Crime drama, guest starring Marina Sirtis

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team, alongside the FBI and MI6, continues the international manhunt for a disgraced British spy who is seeking revenge on the agents he blames for his wife's death. A re-examination of the fugitive's conviction for selling military intelligence reveals that he may have been framed - and the identity of the only person who can clear his name

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Ziva's family farm in Israel is devastated by an explosion, and the former NCIS agent is reported dead. Determined to seek justice, Tony ignores orders to stay off the case and sets out to track down Trent Kort, the British national and ex-CIA agent who remains the prime suspect

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The naval crime drama spin-off returns, picking up with Pride and his team in the wake of the departure of Meredith Brody, who left for good after a close call with a terrorist. Concerns are raised about whether the unit has been irreparably compromised, and FBI special agent Tammy Gregorio is assigned to discover the truth. However, the agents are quickly given a chance to prove their effectiveness, as they co-ordinate with various other federal agencies to track down a sniper targeting special events across New Orleans. Starring Scott Bakula

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson's suspicions about a kidnapping victim lead her to uncover a criminal network that will go to any lengths to silence those that threaten their plans

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate the murder of a 14-year-old immigrant girl, and initially suspect the involvement of a thug with a history of violence - but the case is complicated by the discovery that the victim was married to a 35-year-old polygamist

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A pilot hijacks a commercial plane to escape from the man who attacked her, and Barba targets the airline for driving her to drastic action with an abusive working culture. Meanwhile, Fin takes steps to ensure Benson is protected at work

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A right-wing public speaker is raped after one of her public appearances is disrupted by a protest

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The body of a woman is discovered in a reputedly haunted area of Central Park and first impressions suggest she was scared to death. When Mac returns to the scene, he finds another body and is shocked when this second victim is revealed to be Chief Carver's sister, who had been missing for 15 years. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mac continues the investigation into the killing of Carver's sister and discovers a bullet lodged in the corpse's chest that matches a gun registered to the chief. However, Jo warns him of the consequences of accusing a senior officer of murder. Starring Gary Sinise and John Larroquette

programme.title: The Detail
programme.desc: When a drug trafficker is found murdered at a rented house, the team starts an investigation. Things get complicated when Jack finds her brother at the scene

programme.title: The Detail
programme.desc: The detectives investigate when a burned corpse is found, and their only leads are a dog collar found round his neck and the fact he had a limp. Drama, starring Angela Griffin

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A carjacking turns nasty when an off-duty police officer is killed and the driver is kidnapped. Luckily, Briscoe and Curtis capture one of the perpetrators, who offers to reveal the whereabouts of the missing driver to DA Ross - in exchange for immunity on the cop-killing charge. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives probe the shooting of a motorist, and arrest a man who helped the victim change a tyre on his car shortly before he was killed. The suspect protests his innocence, and points the investigators in the direction of another man who admits to the crime and even signs a confession, but further inquiries cast doubt on his guilt. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Benjamin Bratt

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the death of a book editor who was reputedly having an affair with one of her authors, and find themselves focusing on the lover's long-time companion, whose alibi turns out to be a tissue of lies. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy faces bad memories when a drunk driver kills three people - and finds himself forced to protect the perpetrator in the process. Award-winning police drama, starring Benjamin Bratt and Jerry Orbach

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Ross investigate when a restaurant becomes the scene of a shooting, and discover one of the diners is concealing a desire for revenge. Unfortunately, the object of their suspicion has a clever defence already up her sleeve - and only an expert witness can break her story. Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell star

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A charity worker with a secret appetite for sordid encounters dies at the hands of a serial killer, but the defendant constructs a unique case by claiming the crime was the result of exposure to excessive violence on television. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Carey Lowell

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An explosion at an apartment building brings navy officer Terence Keith to the team's attention and it transpires he had been on medication for anxiety, a condition that had led to him being ejected from a pilot's training course. Ducky's profile of Keith suggests that he may be unstable and about to exact revenge for having his dream of becoming a fighter ace taken away from him, and evidence points to him intending to carry out a suicide attack

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman is found murdered and Gibbs and McGee are called in when she is discovered to be carrying ID bearing the name Sgt Patricia Moreno, a US marine known to have died several years earlier. The victim is discovered to have come to America from Afghanistan and a necklace reveals a fingerprint that leads the team to a known assassin. Guest starring Lolita Davidovich

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gibbs continues to blame himself for Kate's death, and enlists Jenny's help to track down Ari - but they are nearly killed in a shoot-out. Just when all seems lost, however, Ziva is able to point the investigation in the right direction. Starring Mark Harmon and Cote de Pablo

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a decorated petty officer, whose body was found in a sports arena. The victim was discovered clutching a rifle, and it seems he had been engaged in a fire-fight, but when the agents fire the weapon, they discover it is a tranquilliser gun. A chain of evidence leads the investigators to a past kidnapping case involving another petty officer, who was last seen in Mexico. Meanwhile, Tammy Gregorio officially joins the team, as Pride seeks a way to get the FBI off his back

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A psychiatrist is found murdered, leading Goren and Eames to suspect an ophthalmologist may be involved, especially when they realise that his research into schizophrenia could be masking mental health problems of his own. Crime drama, starring Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A socialite's body is found in Central Park, and detectives Benson and Stabler initially suspect her wealthy boyfriend of murder. However, the investigation reveals the victim has been living a double life, posing as a homeless teenager - and the team discovers a street family loyal to its sinister leader. Starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and Lake team up with FBI agent Lauren Cooper to track down a serial killer who has claimed the lives of more than 20 women - but discover that he too has been murdered. The investigation leads them to a warehouse where they find a hidden torture chamber containing a surviving victim - but she later dies, shutting down a vital line of inquiry and complicating the case still further

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an infant goes missing, detectives take sides in the family's right-to-die court case and Barba's interference in the case puts the whole DA's office in jeopardy. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A doctor, arrested for sexually abusing his patients, is set free after Cassidy's testimony causes a mistrial. Lorenzo Scott and Dean Winters guest star

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Jo discover the body of a department store manager in a shop window when they apprehend a pickpocket. They suspect the thief of murder, but his excuse leads them to the victim's assistant, who appears to have planned the crime. However, they unearth evidence that her dead boss had been accused of sexual harassment and had wounds on his body indicating that he might also have been an assailant. Drama, starring Gary Sinise and Sela Ward

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A person dressed in a clown costume murders a bakery owner. The evidence leads to a man from Flack's past who reluctantly agreed to join the witness protection programme to testify against drug dealers. Crime drama, starring Eddie Cahill

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: Customs UK
programme.desc: A passenger at Bristol Airport is caught smuggling cigarettes and admits to doing it for more than 10 years, and a suspicious bag is seized at Gatwick with £55,000 of cannabis inside. Plus, the crew of the fast cutter searcher investigates mysterious pot-markers off the Cornish coast

programme.title: Customs UK
programme.desc: Customs officers at Bristol catch three passengers carrying 87kg of tobacco. Claiming the amount is for personal use they put up a fight when they learn they may not be allowed to keep it. The crew of the Searcher boards a yacht on the trail of drugs, and a sniffer dog picks up a scent at Gatwick that turns out to be cocaine. John Rand narrates

programme.desc: Following the work of police officers in New Zealand, featuring behind-the-scenes access to cases and revealing new information about high profile crimes. Hosted and narrated by Detective Sergeant Rob Lemoto

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Bareil and Wynn compete to be elected as Bajor's spiritual leader. Starring Avery Brooks and Rene Auberjonois

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Following a haunting in Eli's apartment building, he and Melinda try to help his neighbour find the root of the visitation. However, the woman's refusal to tell the truth leads to danger. Meanwhile, Jim realises the complications of picking up his life again. Guest starring Hilary Duff

programme.title: Merlin
programme.desc: A challenge to Arthur from a mysterious warrior sets in motion a terrible chain of events, which leads to the uncovering of a dark secret that threatens the whole kingdom, as Merlin and the Prince respond to a request from the beautiful Morgause. Emilia Fox (Silent Witness) guest stars alongside Bradley James and Colin Morgan

programme.title: Double Murder
programme.desc: The story of how, in June 2005, police made the grim discovery of two Polish brothers who had been murdered by extreme blunt force trauma, and the investigation that ensued

programme.title: Countdown to Murder
programme.desc: Maureen Cosgrove was a pillar of her community in Carshalton, south London, but when unemployed drifter George Maben fell in love with her youngest daughter and moved in, the 65-year-old had unwittingly invited her murderer into her home. This programme charts the events leading up to her death in 2009 and includes interviews with Maureen's son John, friends of the family and DCI John McFarlane from the Metropolitan Police, as well as featuring contributions by forensic psychologists

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: Police hunt for a man wanted for domestic violence, while a tip-off leads to a drugs raid and an uninsured driver gives officers the runaround

programme.title: Brit Cops
programme.desc: Documentary series that follows police officers as they tackle crime

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: Rowdy tourists cause problems in Reading, a routine stop gets out of hand for police in Slough, and an officer has a lucky escape after being involved in a head-on collision. Plus, footage of a pursuit involving six patrol cars, a helicopter and three stingers

programme.title: Banged Up Abroad
programme.desc: How a British student fled across South America to escape from Argentina after being accused of smuggling cocaine

programme.title: UK Border Force
programme.desc: Officers refuse entry to a woman from South Africa who admits her intention is to work illegally to support her family, and a bingo hall in Somerset is raided. Plus, five Iraqis are discovered in the back of a lorry in Calais

programme.title: The Listening Post
programme.desc: News. What is being reported by world media and how? Richard Gizbert guides you through the global news maze

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps Wiltshire couple and pop opera fanatics Nikki Kedge and Angela Rawson find a bigger home in their dream location of Scotland's west coast. Desperate for more room to put on plays for local children, they view six houses in the county of Dumfries and Galloway - but will there be anything that tickles their fancy?

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps a Bristol-based family longing for the open spaces and breathtaking countryside offered by the east coast of Scotland. The hunt for their dream property takes them more than 60 miles along the coastline, visiting Dundee, renowned for its marmalade and 400-million-year-old volcano, the harbour town of Montrose and Stonehaven, home to Dunnottar Castle

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett selects memorable moments from the house-hunting series as she returns to some of her favourite locations. From Woolacombe to Whitby, and Margate to the Isle of Wight, the retrospective illustrates why the English coastline has become the latest property hotspot

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: Supersonic Saucer (1956)
programme.desc: A group of children help protect a stranded alien from criminals who want to exploit his strange powers. Sci-fi adventure, starring Marcia Manolescue and Gillian Harrison

programme.title: The Kid From Canada (1958)
programme.desc: A boy visits his family in the Scottish Highlands, where his boastfulness gets him into trouble during a horse riding trip. Family drama, with Christopher Braden and Bernard Braden

programme.title: For the Love of Ada (1972)
programme.desc: A pensioner goes to great lengths to celebrate her wedding anniversary. Comedy, based on the 1970s sitcom, starring Irene Handl and Wilfred Pickles

programme.title: One Good Turn (1954)
programme.desc: A boy living in an orphanage grows up to be the institution's lovable but clumsy caretaker. He must save the children's home from a wicked property developer who wants to build a factory on the site, and tricks him into taking the kids to the seaside so he can knock the building down. Comedy, starring Norman Wisdom and Joan Rice

programme.title: The Wind of Change (1961)
programme.desc: An unemployed teenager in Notting Hill grows increasingly frustrated with his life, his anger manifesting as a deep-seated racism. When he and his friends commit a brutal act of violence on a black man and his white girlfriend, the attack has devastating repercussions for his family. Drama, starring Donald Pleasence and Johnny Briggs

programme.title: King Willy
programme.desc: A portrait of the famous old Hampstead pub William IV. Observe the action and hear from a number of regulars about their experiences and enjoyment of this establishment

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Property expert Fay Davies helps an Oxford woman hoping to relocate to Spain find the ideal apartment in Barcelona

programme.title: Capital Conversation
programme.desc: London-based current affair series, with Michael Hayman

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: Modern Times
programme.desc: Documentary about the characters who live and work in the area of central London, which is famous for being the most coveted square on the Monopoly board and is home to Claridge's hotel and Christie's auction house. The film reveals a world of surprises and deep contrasts, including an estate agent selling multimillion-pound mansions, cafe owners hanging on to their livelihoods by their fingernails, an NHS doctor whose patients range from billionaires to people on benefits, an upmarket resident who dresses in Victorian clothing and a cabbie living in social housing

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: Exploring the London's surprising and secret wildlife, including seals, parakeets, badgers, foxes and even pelicans who have made London their home. The programme also focuses on the admirers of these animals, from Billingsgate fish porters and Indian chefs to Crayfish Bob, who scours the canals for foreign species

programme.title: Fingersmith
programme.desc: As Maud's wedding day approaches, Sue struggles to hide both her love for her mistress and her guilt over Rivers' plan to send his new wife to an asylum once they are married, but cannot stop the scheme from going ahead. When the ceremony is over, a shocking turn of events puts her in a terrifying situation that she could never have foreseen. Drama, starring Sally Hawkins, Rupert Evans, Elaine Cassidy and Imelda Staunton

programme.title: Last Passenger (2013)
programme.desc: A widowed doctor travelling by train with his son realises that the mysterious driver has cut the brakes and they are speeding toward a fatal collision. With the aid of four of his fellow passengers, they try to find a way to avert the disaster. Thriller, starring Dougray Scott, Kara Tointon and Lindsay Duncan

programme.title: Hot Property (2016)
programme.desc: A corporate spy loses her job after getting caught embezzling, and is no longer able to fund her lavish lifestyle. Faced with being evicted from her rented home, she puts all her skills of deception into fending off the landlord, replacement tenants and a psychotic estate agent. Comedy, starring MyAnna Buring and Tom Rhys Harries

programme.title: Modern Times
programme.desc: Documentary about the characters who live and work in the area of central London, which is famous for being the most coveted square on the Monopoly board and is home to Claridge's hotel and Christie's auction house. The film reveals a world of surprises and deep contrasts, including an estate agent selling multimillion-pound mansions, cafe owners hanging on to their livelihoods by their fingernails, an NHS doctor whose patients range from billionaires to people on benefits, an upmarket resident who dresses in Victorian clothing and a cabbie living in social housing

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Presenter Amanda Lamb accompanies mother and daughter Carol and Helen Giles to Florida's Gulf Coast in search of a house for £100,000. Among the properties featured are a three-bedroom detached house and a beachfront apartment

programme.title: A Place by the Sea
programme.desc: Seetha Hallett helps house-hunters looking for a property on the coast to find their dream home

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Fay Davies is on hand with advice for a couple searching for a second home in Majorca, considering everything from a restored windmill to a city-centre penthouse

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Tjure's new baby is having trouble sleeping - and cries so loudly that Halvar also gets no sleep the night before an important battle

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Snorre's mother refuses to let the harvest celebration go ahead until her smelly son has cleaned up his act - so Vic tries to trick him into washing

programme.title: Modern Times
programme.desc: Documentary about the characters who live and work in the area of central London, which is famous for being the most coveted square on the Monopoly board and is home to Claridge's hotel and Christie's auction house. The film reveals a world of surprises and deep contrasts, including an estate agent selling multimillion-pound mansions, cafe owners hanging on to their livelihoods by their fingernails, an NHS doctor whose patients range from billionaires to people on benefits, an upmarket resident who dresses in Victorian clothing and a cabbie living in social housing

programme.title: Portrait from Life (1949)
programme.desc: A British army officer searches for a Jewish refugee in post-war Germany, only to discover that she has lost her memory. Romantic mystery, starring Robert Beatty and Mai Zetterling

programme.title: Saturday Night Out (1963)
programme.desc: Five sailors spend their overnight leave in London, where they get involved with a variety of unusual characters. Drama, starring Bernard Lee, Heather Sears and John Bonney

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing Crystal Palace and Shoreditch. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Fay Davies offers advice to couple Adam and Vivienne, who have decided to drop out of the rat race and move to Correze in France. However, with only £60,000 to spend it seems they will have to renovate a place themselves

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Keen runners Richard and Eileen love sunny Cyprus so much they've been coming back for 15 years and have even booked their places on the island's annual half marathon. All they need now is their very own holiday home in their favourite town of Oroklini, where they can also entertain their 13 children and grandchildren. Ben Hillman offers his expert help, lining up five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: Henry VIII's Enforcer: The Rise and Fall of Thomas Cromwell
programme.desc: Lawyer and statesman Thomas Cromwell served as chief minister to Henry VIII from 1532 to 1540 and has gone down in history as one of the most corrupt and manipulative people ever to hold power in England. In this documentary Diarmaid MacCulloch reveals another side to the man, arguing that Cromwell was a principled idealist and revolutionary whose radical evangelism laid the foundations for the modern British state

programme.title: Once a Soldier
programme.desc: Open for over 300 years and home to 320 old soldiers, the Royal Hospital in Chelsea is under threat. This series follows the residents for a year of their lives

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sisters Sharon and Tracey's lives are changed for ever when their husbands leave for work and never return. First episode of the popular comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Murder Investigation Team
programme.desc: The body of a red-haired woman is discovered in woodland and the team soon suspect her husband _ but when he proves to have a cast-iron alibi, they are forced to look further afield. A new lead presents itself in the form of a second redhead, who's in hospital after being drugged, and the trail of evidence leads to a former mortuary attendant who developed warped sexual preferences

programme.title: White Collar Boxing League
programme.desc: Fast-paced adrenaline-filled White Collar Boxing from The WBCL. Fighting talk, getting up close and personal to the competitors in and out of the ring

programme.title: Death Trench (2017)
programme.desc: At the end of the First World War, a squad of soldiers investigates an abandoned German underground base. They soon face a fight for survival against the victims of an experimental biological weapon, who have been transformed into frenzied bloodthirsty killers. Horror, starring Rossif Sutherland and Robert Stadlober

programme.title: Relentless (2020)
programme.desc: An ex-convict must stay out of trouble for one more day to secure his freedom - but must choose between his principles and his future when he comes to the aid of a prostitute under threat from a gang. Action thriller, starring Steven Murphy and Tiffany-Ellen Robinson

programme.title: Murder Investigation Team
programme.desc: The body of a red-haired woman is discovered in woodland and the team soon suspect her husband _ but when he proves to have a cast-iron alibi, they are forced to look further afield. A new lead presents itself in the form of a second redhead, who's in hospital after being drugged, and the trail of evidence leads to a former mortuary attendant who developed warped sexual preferences

programme.title: A Moody Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas again for the Moodys and the day comes with several surprises for Dan. He learns that his brother has a secret child, the family business is failing and his ex-girlfriend is dating his cousin. Australian comedy, starring Ian Meadows

programme.title: Rockets in the Dunes (1960)
programme.desc: A Devon beach is used by local children for racing sand yachts, but their fun may be at an end when the army plan to use the dunes as a training ground. The youngsters rally the local community to save their beach, but the discovery of disused mines complicates things further. Family drama, starring Richard Adam and Fiona Davie

programme.title: The Kid From Canada (1958)
programme.desc: A boy visits his family in the Scottish Highlands, where his boastfulness gets him into trouble during a horse riding trip. Family drama, with Christopher Braden and Bernard Braden

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Gilby and the other children steal the drakkar - but the young captain knows nothing about navigation and soon gets hopelessly lost at sea

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: A phoney sorcerer visits the village, and Vic is determined to uncover the truth behind his apparent magical powers

programme.title: Zot the Dog
programme.desc: The tales of Zot, a good-hearted, fun-loving but rather bouncy dog and his best pal, Clive

programme.title: Zot the Dog
programme.desc: The tales of Zot, a good-hearted, fun-loving but rather bouncy dog and his best pal, Clive

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: A magic carpet sends Jack and Tashi back to prehistoric times. When they return, they discover they have changed history so monkeys now rule the world

programme.title: Tashi
programme.desc: Jack buys a pair of magic shoes that will help him win a dance contest. However, he finds that once they start dancing, they cannot stop

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Nils finds a map in a bottle on a Scandinavian island which shows the hiding place of Ulrik the Green's treasure

programme.title: Nils Holgersson
programme.desc: Akka decides to make Nils, Martin and Gorgo take an exam on general goose knowledge

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Series featuring inspirational walks between from around Britain. Andrew White walks on a disused railway in the Peak District and alongside the Caledonian Canal

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: Insight into the daily lives of the troopers of the Household Cavalry, the British Army's most senior regiments. The horsemen practice for the state opening of Parliament - an exercise that takes place during the dead of night. New recruits learn to ride the hard way at Windsor, and the armoured division gets into a fire fight with the Paras

programme.title: Prime Suspect: Jack the Ripper
programme.desc: Investigating whether DNA tests can prove that notorious 19th-century serial killer Jack the Ripper was Australian convict Frederick Bailey Deeming

programme.title: Once a Soldier
programme.desc: Open for over 300 years and home to 320 old soldiers, the Royal Hospital in Chelsea is under threat. This series follows the residents for a year of their lives

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sisters Sharon and Tracey's lives are changed for ever when their husbands leave for work and never return. First episode of the popular comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: Henry VIII's Enforcer: The Rise and Fall of Thomas Cromwell
programme.desc: Lawyer and statesman Thomas Cromwell served as chief minister to Henry VIII from 1532 to 1540 and has gone down in history as one of the most corrupt and manipulative people ever to hold power in England. In this documentary Diarmaid MacCulloch reveals another side to the man, arguing that Cromwell was a principled idealist and revolutionary whose radical evangelism laid the foundations for the modern British state

programme.title: Kind Hearts and Coronets (1949)
programme.desc: The penniless grandson of a duke plots to eliminate the eight relatives standing between him and a vast inheritance. He shoots, drowns, poisons and explodes his way through his family tree, but his final triumph is ruined when his lady love's husband kills himself. Ealing black comedy, starring Alec Guinness as all eight potential victims, with Dennis Price, Valerie Hobson and Joan Greenwood

programme.title: The Big Money (1956)
programme.desc: An incompetent thief finally manages to make his family of crooks proud of him by pulling off a major robbery, but finds his ill-gotten gains bring him anything but happiness. Comedy, starring Ian Carmichael, Belinda Lee, Kathleen Harrison and Robert Helpmann

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: Insight into the daily lives of the troopers of the Household Cavalry, the British Army's most senior regiments. The horsemen practice for the state opening of Parliament - an exercise that takes place during the dead of night. New recruits learn to ride the hard way at Windsor, and the armoured division gets into a fire fight with the Paras

programme.title: Earth Cycle
programme.desc: Simon Parker charts the seasonal cycles of the natural world as he journeys through Scandinavia on a bicycle, wild camping, seeing animal migrations and sampling local food

programme.title: Trust Me, I'm a Doctor
programme.desc: Medical journalist Michael Mosley and a team of doctors offer advice on health, using their expertise and the latest research to investigate the truth behind various claims being made in the media. Surgeon Gabriel Weston takes part in an experiment at the University of Surrey's Sleep Research Centre to discover whether an extra hour in bed could have major benefits, while A&E specialist Dr Saleyha Ahsan asks if people can be overweight and still healthy, and tests the accuracy of two different methods used to assess fatness

programme.title: Henry VIII: Mind of a Tyrant
programme.desc: Dr David Starkey examines how the Tudor monarch forged a fiercely independent England whose coastal defences and naval power created a new sense of national destiny. He also explores the death of Jane Seymour and her replacement in the monarch's affections by Katherine Howard, whose adultery made her another victim of court intrigue

programme.title: Rachel Khoo's Kitchen Notebook
programme.desc: The Paris-based chef returns to her home city to see what its most interesting eateries have to offer. In the first edition, she visits a pop-up restaurant in a boutique

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: The sisters face up to the realities of life with their husbands in prison, and try to explain things to Tracey's son, Garth. Classic comedy, starring Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson

programme.title: The Prosecution of Julian Assange
programme.desc: The events that led to the prosecution of one of the most influential figures to emerge this century, who is lauded and dismissed as hero and villain

programme.title: Chubby Funny (2016)
programme.desc: An aspiring actor continually blames others for his failure to become a big star. He decides to give himself a year living in London to finally land his big break - but the personal crises that have dogged him all his life are not going away. Comedy drama, directed by and starring Harry Michell, with Augustus Prew and Jeff Rawle

programme.title: The Escort (2015)
programme.desc: A sex-obsessed journalist whose career is falling apart has a chance encounter in a bar with a high-class prostitute. Seeing a chance to write the story that will make him a success, he persuades her to let him document her life, and a strange connection develops between the two lonely outsiders. Comedy drama, starring Michael Doneger, Lyndsy Fonseca and Bruce Campbell

programme.title: My Saviour (2019)
programme.desc: A woman whose life is in disarray is attacked by a local gang, only for a mysterious stranger to come to her rescue. She forms an intense relationship with her rescuer, but their close bond sends her on a disturbing journey into a nightmarish world of violence and abuse. Drama, starring Bayley Freer and Steven Murphy

programme.title: The Queen's Cavalry
programme.desc: Insight into the daily lives of the troopers of the Household Cavalry, the British Army's most senior regiments. The horsemen practice for the state opening of Parliament - an exercise that takes place during the dead of night. New recruits learn to ride the hard way at Windsor, and the armoured division gets into a fire fight with the Paras

programme.title: Supersonic Saucer (1956)
programme.desc: A group of children help protect a stranded alien from criminals who want to exploit his strange powers. Sci-fi adventure, starring Marcia Manolescue and Gillian Harrison

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: The Cube
programme.desc: Windsurfing instructor George wants to win enough money to buy a dream campervan and travel around Australia, while seamstress Octavia has her sights set on an internship in New York. Tackling a series of increasingly difficult challenges, the contestants are under pressure to hold their nerve as friends, family and the studio audience watch their every move. The further they go in the competition, the more cash they take home, up to a jackpot of £250,000. Phillip Schofield hosts

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman invite another selection of famous faces to take part in the unorthodox general knowledge quiz. This time, the celebrities all come from the world of TV talent shows, as former Fame Academy headmaster Richard Park teams up with David Grant, one of the show's ex-tutors. Actor and singer Ben Forster, who won ITV's Superstar, joins forces with Danielle Hope, winner of BBC's Over the Rainbow, and Patti Boulaye, who emerged victorious from the 1978 talent show New Faces, collaborates with Nina Myskow, one of the show's panellists. Finally, Britain's Got Talent 2012 champions Ashleigh and Pudsey allies with 2015 runner-up Jamie Raven

programme.desc: A look back at the 1991-92 season, in which Manchester United and Leeds United fought for the title in the final campaign before the arrival of the Premiership. The Red Devils were favourites to end their long title drought as Liverpool faltered with an ageing side, but Howard Wilkinson's men refused to give up the chase

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Brentford v Yeovil Town. Action from the 2012/13 League One play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where the remaining place in the following season's Championship was decided. Brentford agonisingly missed out on automatic promotion on the final day of the regular campaign, but recovered to defeat Swindon Town on penalties in their semi-final, while Yeovil were 2-1 aggregate victors over Sheffield United

programme.title: EFL Highlights
programme.desc: Bradford City v Northampton Town. Action from the 2012/13 League Two play-off final at Wembley Stadium, where promotion to League One awaited the winners. The Bantams were making their second appearance of the season at Wembley having also reached the League Cup final following an outstanding giant-killing run, and they needed to come from behind to edge out Burton Albion to reach this stage. The Cobblers ended a run of recent poor form to win 1-0 in both legs of their semi-final against Cheltenham Town to move within one match of reaching the third tier of English football
